At Rueb Stoller Daniel, we're dedicated to fighting for individuals who have been harmed by dangerous drugs, defective medical devices, and corporate negligence through mass tort and class action litigation. Our mission is to hold the biggest corporations in America accountable and secure justice for our clients. We take great pride in the relationships we build with those we represent, and it troubles us deeply when someone has a less than positive experience.
Please contact our office at your earliest convenience so we can discuss your concerns and work toward a resolution. We're available 24/7 and committed to making things right. Every client matters to us, and we want to ensure you feel heard and supported.

Suzanne left a lifelong impression on my hurting heart, she understood the emotional weight and the need for justice. She honored me and my father. The words "Thank you" will never be enough.

reviews.text: Greg restored my faith in the legal system and I would recommend him to anyone/everyone who's recently been in a car accident.  I was in an unfortunate accident two weeks ago and was in shock when I called up my car insurance company and was immediately pushed into giving a recorded statement.  I felt steamrolled by my insurance company (they are not your ally), especially since they immediately pronounced me 100% at-fault without any defense (and without even letting me know).  I needed an expert coach to get me through the process and defend my rights.  I started calling attorneys and after 15 calls of bureaucratic rejections I felt defeated.  These large legal "corporations" would have a rep answer the phone, punch my info into a computer, and then say, "Sorry, but we don't cover minor accidents".  I was literally about to give up (and cry), but then Attorney Hood picked up the phone.  Yes... he, the actual attorney, called me back and asked for my full story: what happened, why did I feel cheated, etc.  He was compassionate, patient, and infinitely helpful.  He started sending me legal terms to use and lawsuits to reference.  He took the time to actually show/explain to me my rights.  I can't thank you enough Greg!  Highly highly recommend!

My mother (Gina) is currently using his services. She has expressed that Boris is an amazing attorney. He is very patient and understanding with her. His staff is also very helpful. I would recommend his law office to anyone looking for assistance in his field.

With respect to the review by Bruce Bacon below, he conveniently left out the fact that, without consulting me, he sent a hostile, inappropriate, and counterproductive letter directly to the Court-Appointed Attorney ("CAA") for his mother and, thereby, antagonized the "CAA" and thwarted my efforts to get the "CAA" on our side.

I have an 89 yr. old mom who's whereabouts is still unknown to our family and her friends. My brother who has power of health has moved her into isolation; obviously for financial and emotional reasons.  But it's our mom  we want to see, talk to, be with and to know she is alright. She is missing since February.  So, I hired Boris Siegel to aid us with a conservatorship request. I now know hiring him was a mistake.

He did not want to or could not make a case for our mom. He should have not taken our case and instead directed us to an elder abuse attorney, he didn't. Things went downhill from there. He is very good at filling out forms, you will find this out immediately.  However once I signed his retainer agreement I saw his work slack off, and the cash register started ringing! He was very deliberate.  He must be in control.  But its hard to get sophistication from this approach, and his was minimal and simple.

I asked him many times can you include support for our position he just laughed it off! My mom's was eating stale food, un changed sanitary, not bathed in months, long nails, and just confined. Boris said this is just average and basic, and not to worry.    Then the opposition supplied pages and pages of well written documents. We had only a few sentences, and nothing from my mom's brother who is a energetic ER physician. The result was the court appointee did not have a clear picture. His suggestions to the judge supports continued abuse.  Of course it was because Boris did not present this abuse. He didn't speak about my brother, who runs my mom's estate.   Of course Boris clearly denies any feedback. Friends If you need energetic and sophisticated legal work maybe this guy is not for you!

We have lost valuable time in our case. I  recognized his approach  is lacking in skills.  His approach is:  I am bigger and stronger than you so I am taking charge!  This doesn't work when more is needed.

I explained this to Boris and said no more and thank you, I do not need your services- this is not working! That was a month ago. The cash register still keeps ringing and he won't let it go!  When I ask him to please stop harassing me, asking for more money and billing me. He would not stop. My mom is currently missing and her whereabouts unknown.  His stuff didn't work and only caused us more stress.

I could never write a review elequent enough to
Completely describe  our experiences using Mr Siegel as Our attorney.in an extremely complicated case of my sociopathic sister
Squatting in my deceased mothers home and
Holding it for ransom. You would think the courts could protect you from such blatant
Disregard for trust laws but beware! Get a good Lawer! Boris is an attorneys attorney. He is honest, forthright And compassionate. He will
Not sugarcoat the outcome. My sisters attorneys viscously attached his character and the legality of Our main document and Boris’s document held up under the judge’s scrutiny and it was proven by the courts to be valid.
Then after my wife’s mother passed, again one of her siblings is trying to sell a property below value To another beneficiary ( a clear no no in administering a trust) and we will rely on Boris’s
Experience to help de-escalate the situation if
Possible and ultimately defend the trust.
I cannot say enough about Boris,Vicki and Debbie, they are like family to us now.
I love this Attorney.  He is definately the Attorneys Attorney.  He is 100% confident in his brilliant intelligence,  compassionate and kind,  smart smart smart guy.  I am so glad i hired Boris.

8/1/2017
Attorney Boris Siegel is an attorney's attorney.  He is the real deal.  I had a complicated conservatorship case involving my mother and a crazy difficult sister who wanted to take it all the way to litigation.  My former attorney told me he was not able to litigate and recommended I find another attorney.  I called Mr. Siegel and his confidence and experience shined instantly on the ten minute phone call.  I hired him immediately and I did not regret it.  He ultimately got me control and my power of attorney was finally recognized by the nursing home and doctors,  I was able to give my mother her wish of being a DNR and I had her relocated to a five star facility where she had her own room.  At the same time I also hired him to represent me in a partition sale lawsuit against my unreasonable sister who ended up making the case last over one year by playing games like not showing up to deposition and asking for extensions.  Mr. Siegel knew exactly how to deal with my difficult sister and when we finally went to trial his skills were so amazing that he was able to win the entire case for me to not only get me what I asked for in respect to the interest of the house but he also got me my ENTIRE ATTORNEY FEES PAID BACK TO ME from my sister through the sale proceeds of the house.  That is something that is not easy to get and yet he did it.  I highly recommend Attorney Boris Siegel for your future litigation needs!  Here are just a few more reasons why I recommend him:

1. He is not afraid to take on difficult cases.
2. He is always available for any questions you might have no matter how small.
3. He always reassured me and explained things in detail.
4. His staff is very professional and helpful.  Debbie, his legal assistant, and Vikki, his paralegal, were great to me.
5. He is honest and has integrity.  He always tried to save me money by telling me where I would be wasting my time and money and to not pursue certain avenues.
6. He is a very likable and caring person.  I always felt like I was his friend and that he truly cared about what happened to me and my family during the difficult times.
7. He has many years of experience and I wish I had hired him from the beginning instead of wasting my time and money on a younger less experienced attorney who ultimately did nothing but file a conservatorship application and yet allowed my sister to run my mother in the nursing home when I had the legal papers.
8. Mr. Siegel is not only a nice person but he is a tiger when it comes to litigation.  I could not be more impressed with him as my attorney and as a person.
9. He would always be thinking of ways to help my case and he was very creative in getting things done for me as his client.
10. He would always make predictions and I would laugh on the inside thinking there's no way this will happen.  Ultimately he had the last laugh because everything he had predicted to me actually happened and I was happy to be wrong!

I am glad I used the services of Demetri. He spent time with me explaining the process and told me cases can take some time. He kindly answered my questions and had great communication with me. I recommend using Demetri's services.  I'm very happy with my settlement.  Thank you!

In the earliest stages in my case, I worked with Ali Moghaddami in Glendale, but turned to Demetri after my first attorney acted unprofessionally. Dr Wofford, my chiropractor in Encinitas, told me Demetri was the best of the best (that the case may take longer, but he would get a larger settlement than most attorneys). He wasn't kidding.

His unwavering professionalism and credibility are outstanding. He handles a high number of cases, and I saw a lot of myself in the way he works (efficiency and time management-wise) so when I wanted an update, I'd text or email and he was always responsive if not in court. He is a phenomenal advocate for his clients.

Demetri's passion for the law and genuine concern for his clients drive him to be a superior litigator. He is a true scholar of the law. Whenever I have a difficult legal issue, I will turn to him for help. Demetri's strong character is displayed both professionally and as a great man. He is an excellent attorney that I highly recommend. He is intelligent and reasonable and has a great understanding of the law.

I have developed a great friendship with Demetri and have been able to lean on him for occasional advice now that I am in law school, and will seek his mentorship throughout my career in the legal space. Thank you for all you have done for me Demetri. You are the only attorney I would recommend to anyone.

It says "Tosi Law LLC" right there. Have you seen any other law firm structured as an LLC? I don't think so. Their website used to have a photo of their front doors that clearly said "Tosi Law LLP.") I can't fathom why they would repeatedly make that gross error. Makes you wonder other aspects of the law they're ignoring or unaware of (like not being recognized as a business entity by both the California and Georgia Secretaries of State.)
And here's an "Oh, by the Way." If they are actually an LLC, do LLC's have Partners? The guy who calls himself the business owner told me one of his "partners" would get back to me.
I'm like "one of your business partners in the LLC? Your website shows ONE other attorney working with you.
Tosi Law has been incredibly quiet in the three years since we retained them for the Roundup/Monsanto/Bayer Class Action. This review is to urge potential clients to go elsewhere.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Nash,

As we have previously explained, we do not represent you in any capacity. While we understand you may be related to our client, our ethical obligations strictly prohibit us from sharing any information about a client’s case without their express consent.

In this matter, our client has specifically instructed us not to disclose case details to anyone, including family members.

We appreciate your understanding that we must follow our client’s instructions and the professional confidentiality rules that govern our work. Please contact our client directly for information about the case.

reviews.text: They were very respectful and very compassionate

This is the first time, and hopefully my last that I've had to deal with something of this magnitude.  Tosi has been in contact with me from the beginning.  Tosi law has always  informed me of any changes in my case. I'm glad to have them representing me in this matter. Thank you soo much.  Greatly appreciated.
My experience with Dylan Neeham and all the employees at Tosi Law Firm has been nothing but outstanding.Everyone has gone out of their way to be very kind and helpful. I’d highly recommend them.

We retained the Tosi Law Firm in August of 2022, and have NOT ONCE in the two years and 4 months since then received any sort of update on the status of the case. I decided to hire a different attorney, but the Tosi Law Firm is refusing to provide me a Letter of Disengagement. I notice the Tosi Law Firm web page does not provide an attorney license number, and Tosi Law Firm cannot be found on the CA Secretary of State Business Search web page. I'm not even sure they can legally do business in the State of California.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Mr. Nash,
I have looked into your complaint. As we would have shared with you, given the opportunity, Tosi Law does not represent you directly and was not able to share information with you until permission to speak with you was given by the actual client. Our case file reflects multiple conversations with our case managers. Regular litigation update letters have been emailed as well; however, they would have gone to the client. One of the firm’s attorneys will contact the client regarding disengaging from the firm. We apologize for any frustration you have experienced over this, but I hope you understand that we have ethical responsibilities related to communicating case-specific information to anyone other than the firm’s client.

reviews.text: Been dealing with these folks since 4/23 and any time I enquirer about what’s going on with the case I get a reply about how much money someone else has received but never any update regarding my own case.Im really starting to have tons of questions regarding the legitimacy of the cases and if anything is truly being tried.I have endured 2 separate rounds of treatments,haven’t been able to work since 2/23 due to treatments and lingering side effects,and have built up tons of medical debt aside from what I owe the insurance company Cigna.Do your homework before you decide to go down this rabbit hole I sure wish I would have
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Mr. Drury,

I understand that you were able to speak with our Managing Partner to discuss any questions or concerns you had related to the specifics of your case.

We as a firm are sympathetic to your feelings and can relate to the frustration at the pace at which cases progress.
 
Unfortunately, the mass tort litigation process is complex and often can take years to resolve.  Corporations have seemingly limitless budgets to fight and drag a resolution out.

The good news is that there have been various trials that have taken place around the country recently, with many resulting in great outcomes for those who have been injured.  
 
We are very hopeful that this will move the company responsible closer to resolving all of the claims.

We appreciate very much your continued patience.  As always, feel free to contact your case manager at any time you have questions or concerns related to your claim.   (888) 312-2518

In the meantime, we wish you the best.

Mr. Duquette has published an article on his website that betrays his limited understanding of the California Vehicle Code, specifically CVC 21202(a) and the exceptions contained therein. I would not hire a bicycle attorney who actively purports an opinion contrary to the truth of the rights cyclists are supposed to enjoy in the state of California.
He promotes unsafe practices for cyclists and perpetuates a motorist-centric viewpoint, all while claiming to represent cyclists.
Specifically, he insists cyclists ride on the edge of a narrow lane (a specific condition in the CVC when a cyclist is NOT required to ride to the right).
He puts forth the notion that, somehow, riding on the edge is a protection against a rear-end collision from a distracted driver. There is no protection against a distracted driver that can be provided by hugging the edge of the lane.
reviews.ownerResponse:
While I respect differing points of view, I encourage bicyclists to follow the law. That’s self-evident by an honest review of my publications and California Law. I have been successfully winning bicycle cases for over 33 years, because I promote lawful conduct.

Moreover, upon the reading of my blog post on the issue of “controlling the lane”, it’s clear Mr. Greway* misstates the facts when he says quote: “Specifically, he insists cyclists ride on the edge of a narrow lane…”

*Non client, out of State, lay (non-lawyer) “vehicular bicyclist” rants should be viewed with caution.

To Judge for yourself and form your own opinion, view my publication and hear my podcast on this issue, by going to my blog: http://www.911law.com/Legal-Blog/2016/May/Do-I-Control-the-Traffic-Lane-.aspx.

If there are any further comments on this issue, out of respect, please contact me directly via e-mail on my website contact page.

Ride Safe, Ride Strong,
Richard L. Duquette, Esq.

Where do I start…
In my field of work we’re always heavily trained about working hard, coordinate pt care, know their rights, respect their rights, advocate for them because your license makes you a mandated reporter, HIPAA rules & regulations, don’t share PHI, understand Informed Consent and Refusals of Treatments, make sure to document everything to protect your license, to not do this not do that…,

But they never tell you:
Hey, you as an employee have rights as well!!! You can’t be treated that way, they can’t do that to you because there is ACTUAL LAWS IN THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA THAT PROTECT YOU!

Sadly, I didn’t know my rights, something you don’t really think about when you’re starting a new career and want to focus on learning more, focus on your career growth, doing whatever they tell you because well you just do…?
They are your employer, you’re just an employee, you can be easily replaced…

With that in mind, is great to meet an amazing Attorney who listens to you and educates you about YOUR OWN RIGHTS!

I would ask a question and she would answer in a nonsensical matter, which made it necessary to then speak to Matthew. So then I would have to pay for both her time and his time. I finally made my own agreement with my husband and sent in about a 2 page agreement. They took about a month or so to take my written agreement and add about 15 pages of legalese. I might add, there were errors At the same time they never really commented or advise me on any of my proposals, i.e. is this suggestion good for you or good for opposing party etc. no question as to whether or not this proposal was correct for me. reviews.text:
Exceptional Attorneys Who Truly Fight for You!

I can’t say enough good things about Zack and David Miller at Miller & Steele. They are the only personal injury attorneys I’ve ever worked with who genuinely cared about my case and my future.

I first worked with David Miller back in 2006, after I was hit by a drunk driver. The accident left me with permanent injuries, and David guided me through every step of the process with compassion and expertise. He fought hard on my behalf and secured a very fair award that reflected the true impact of my injuries.

Then, in 2016, I was unfortunately hit by another drunk driver. Let’s not talk about how bad my luck is regarding being on the road. This time, Zack Miller handled my case, and once again, the outcome was excellent. Zack was professional, responsive, and incredibly dedicated to ensuring I received a strong settlement for the pain and losses I suffered.

Before finding the Miller & Steele team, I went through several other attorneys who didn’t seem to understand or care about the seriousness of my injuries. They pushed for me to settle quickly for amounts that didn’t make sense, clearly more interested in closing cases than seeking real justice. That is the complete opposite of how Zack and David operate.

They put in the effort, time, and care to truly fight for their clients. They are honest, thorough, and relentless in pursuing what’s right. Most importantly, they are true experts who know exactly how to handle injury cases like mine, unlike my previous attorneys who seemed unprepared and only wanted an easy, quick and unfair cash grab.

If you want attorneys who will actually stand by you and deliver results, I can’t recommend Miller & Steele highly enough. I guarantee you that I wouldn’t have had the outcome I had without their great work and effort on my cases. Thanks, David and Zack!

reviews.text:
I worked for The Automobile Club of Southern California (AAA) for 35 years handling personal injury claims. During that time I negotiated thousands of claims while working in our litigation department and attended hundreds of mediations, arbitrations and settlement conferences, so got to know a great many attorneys and judges along the way: The good, the bad and the ugly.

I got to know David Miller many years ago through handling claims that he was presenting on behalf of his clients. I developed a respect for David by the effective way he presented and argued his claims. He knew his claims inside and out and knew what I, the adjuster, needed for documentation and justification of the claim submitted. This expedited settlements and reduced costs for all concerned, a clear win-win.

David is a very effective advocate! His experience in evaluating the likely outcome (value) of a claim along with his excellent negotiating skills coupled with the fact that he is no stranger to the courthouse with a track record of very successful trial verdicts, make him a most worthy adversary'

David and I developed a personal friendship and respect for each other even though wearing different colored hats while at work. He's a stand up good guy, as honest as the day is long and a good person to have on your side. He is a good friend, trusted advisor and the clear choice to later represent my son in a serious auto accident achieving a settlement of $500,000.

reviews.text: I was a passenger in a car accident and got pretty busted up. I interviewed four law firms in my pursuit to find attorneys that could be tough enough to represent me but would also listen carefully to my concerns and needs.  The decision was easy as Miller & Steele stood head and shoulders above the other firms.  Miller & Steele's team approach to organizing and presenting my case was incredibly professional and thorough with "spot on" advice throughout the entire process.  It was one of the best decisions of my life to have Miller & Steele represent me in this case and I give them the highest recommendation possible.  My bottom-line advice? Hire the first-class pros at Miller & Steele.  FYI, the final settlement was 50 times larger than the original insurance company offer.

When my custody case went all the way to trial, i knew i needed more than just a lawyer. I needed a fighter. And that’s exactly what miss phinni is
My little one is seven years old — still believes in magic, still needs bedtime stories and someone in their corner. This wasn’t just paperwork and procedure. This was about a child’s world. And this attorney? She understood that and prioritized me and my child’s needs. Very compassionate

there is no justice, only the law, which is richinspirit

The attorney is a maestro when it comes to closing arguments. His speeches are so compelling, they could convince a jury that the smell of cigarettes is just a figment of their imagination, a clever ploy by the opposition to distract from the facts.

I didn't want to retain an attorney but had to.
My ex husband forced my hand by getting himself an attorney.

I couldn't have made a better choice than to retain Paula. She was very informative in what to expect. She made the process easy to digest and ensured all my documents were filed on time.

As they say, in divorce there are no winners. However, I felt like she helped me win my dignity back after my lying, cheating husband sabotaged me.

Was it worth the money spent? Yes.

My biggest regret was representing myself early on. If I had the ability to rewind time, I would have retained Paula. It would have helped me avoid expensive pitfalls..

This Attorney and firm are terrible, no communication, doesn’t return calls, doesn’t return emails, doesn’t provide billing when requested, doesn’t allow you to speak, is terrible at closing arguments, isn’t knowledgeable in closing arguments, doesn’t dress well, smells like cigarettes, over bills and lies. Like all attorneys he is just in it for the money, swindled me for over a g with little work put in. You get what you pay for, I’d of been better off representing myself. Seek other firms and avoid this firm. He doesn’t represent his clients he represents himself. I’m still waiting for my billing that he assured me it wouldn’t cost as much as it did, now I have to file an appeal myself.

Update: I got billing he tried charging me for a 4 hour phone call that never happened, and i have the call logs tried billing me for things he never did and i have everything documented with screen shots, showed up for 2 appearances one he said he’d do for free as it was for a continuence he did not respond to emails which there were only about 10 and were very short which he claimed were long all documented. I fired him and am filing a complaint with the state bar for his unethical conduct and practices.

Let me just tell you first && foremost about how Thomas Fischer gave me everything I asked for && did it faster than I could even blink an eye at! He listened && made sure that he understood everything I was trying to explain to him, I have a pending dissolution case in California that has a dissolved TRO within it that I needed him to write me a letter stating that my child’s father no longer has any custody orders anymore because we all moved out of the state of California together && are now involved with DCS in Indiana because of his abuse, && within the matter of a couple hours, this earth angel of an attorney wrote up the exact letter I needed for my lawyer out here in the state of IN && saved my 4yo boy, who’s on the spectrum from being sent back to his abusive father who’s in Texas!! I know, my situation is quite complicated && confusing!! BUT the moral of this review is to say that Mr. Fischer is the attorney to hire for anything someone has going on that has to do with sticky custody situations or family law!! This man gave me back the meaning of living a life full of joy just by a simple letter, so I can only imagine what he can do for everyone else in need of his services!!
THANK YOU AGAIN FROM THE BOTTOM OF MY HEART THOMAS!!! My babies && I appreciate you more than we could ever express!!!

Because of that I would highly recommend Paula to anyone who is in need of representation in family court and in any matters related to divorce, high conflict, custody, etc. This was my first time using an attorney and Paula made me feel like this wasn't just another job or client for her. I Highly recommend him to anyone looking for a great attorney who won't take advantage of you and actually look out for you!

Having gotten used to getting bad news from my attorney, I was so surprised when Joe told me that, finally, the issues of the past had been resolved.

Joe and Michelle are very communicative and I felt secure in ally dealings with them. I highly recommend these fine people.

Joe and Michele took the time to help me through a divorce that was initially supposed to be easy and self represented but then escalated.

Joe is a true professional. He is not the "bull dog" type lawyer.  He works best as a mediator.  He has a calming presence that serves to deescalate highly contentious individuals and get to a fair resolution quickly.

Michele is knowledgable, helpful and friendly.  She was able to answer most of my questions when Joe was not available.

I can say without a doubt that by working with Joe, my divorce was relatively painless and it saved me and my ex a lot of money in the long run.
My friends joke that I had the easiest, fastest divorce they've ever seen. Thanks to Carnohan's...what a great team Joe and Michele are!

reviews.text: Joe is not your typical attorney.  We were referred to Joe Carnohan by a friend,  The case had become extremely difficult over the first year with a different attorney.  Joe took the case and did an amazing job.  Not only was he knowledgeable but professional and presented his case extremely well.  We were very impressed when one of the judges acknowledged his ability to make difficult cases work in the pass and wanted to know what was so different about this case.  Joe explained and we one that hearing.   Joe has a history of taking difficult cases and getting everybody to work together.  He took our case, in the middle and still did  an outstanding job!!  His legal assistant, Michelle, also outstanding, and always there.   Both were very helpful in easing the emotions, explaining how everything works and what to expect.  They are more than just another legal office.  Joe was Amazing in presentation, and logic in all matters.  He always knew what was most important and never lost focus. Wish he had been our first and only attorney and would Highly Recommend him to anyone.

We know the law concerning uninsured motorist claims better than most attorneys. On November 3, 2022, I am a speaker on a webinar for attorneys about effectively handling uninsured motorist cases.

reviews.text: Russell made the process seamless.  He is honest and forthcoming hiding nothing.  He doesn't inflate the end result to get a client.  I never felt they were behind or needed to get me quicker results as I was kept informed at all times.  Response time to my emails, texts and calls was close to immediate.  He make each client feel important and cared for.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Karen, Thank you for your kind comments. We do take pride in keeping our clients informed about their cases. We are glad you enjoyed your experience with us.
Russell Kohn

reviews.text: Russel and Suzanne were great!  I wouldn’t be where I am today without them.

Jason, we are happy that you were pleased with our services. We pride ourselves on client satisfaction.
Russell Kohn

Thank you for the 5-star review. High reviews mean a lot coming from former clients.

If you need a lawyer for  accidents or personal injury ,get the best ,Russell Kohn and his partner against crime,Suzanne Skolnick.

reviews.text:
“I would like for you to know that from the first time I met Mr. Kohn when he represented my fiance he was straight forward and got the most for her  when I got injured I went to him, from what he did for her I knew i was in good hands with him right from the beginning, he was the right man for the job! Throughout this entire ordeal, Mr. Kohn treated me with the utmost respect and never once did I sense he doubted my side of the story.  That meant the world to me personally.  He kept me informed of how the case was going and in the end he got the highest settlement for my injuries.
I highly recommend a personnel injury attorney law firm, Kohn Law.

reviews.text: I was the victim of an accident that was rather sensitive as it involved family of a very dear friend. I came to Kohn Law Office scared to death, and uncertain of the future. The care I received from Russ and his team, Suzanne Skolnick, was incredible. Together, their empathy and tact throughout a very traumatic insurance claim brought a huge amount of relief during a very difficult time. Russ and Suzanne handled my case with such care. I am forever grateful to Kohn Law Office and highly recommend them to anyone seeking legal assistance.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind review, Jessica.  It means a lot to us!

reviews.text:
As a healthcare professional I have worked with Mr. Cohen for over 20 years. He is a conscientious, kind and compassionate attorney. My patients have been well taken care of and looked after through the entire course of their treatment.
He wins his client's cases and make sure that their medical bills are paid in a timely manner. I highly recommend retaining the services of Attorney Russell Cohen.

I've worked together with Russell Kohn on a number of injury cases and have  witnessed his meticulous preparation, depth of knowledge and skill in the field of personal injury law firsthand.  Russ is a consummate professional. His dedication to his clients is both genuine and inspiring.  As a result, the top space on my referral list for accident attorneys is reserved for Russell Kohn.
reviews.ownerResponse: And now we work together for many satisfied clients, who get two great attorneys for the price of one!

reviews.text: I have personally known Attorney Russell Kohn for over 4 years and have known him to be one of the most talented, professionial and dedicated Personal Injury attorneys in North County. He is a compassionate, caring  and tenacious  legal professional who goes above and beyond for each one of his clients. I would highly recommend Russel Kohn to help anyone looking for assistance with their injury or wrongful death lawsuit.
Good attorney. Gets the job done. No hassles.

Attorney Russell Kohn helped my husband and I reach a settlement with an insurance company in a very prompt and professional manner. We were very satisfied with the results due to the peculiar circumstances of our case. I would definitely recommend the Kohn Law Office if you need a personal injury attorney!

I hired Mr. shore for my hearing, epilepsy, and my neuropsychologist who determined, at 53, I had mild cognitive dysfunction due to my epilepsy medication. I know he has other cases, but he made me feel like I was his only one. He was very patient with my questions, and he was thorough on what to expect in the process with the courts, especially my case as it had gone all the way to the federal court. I would highly recommend him for your Social Security case! Thank you Mr. Shore!!

David and his paralegal Jamee were very helpful from day one in helping me finally win my disability case. They were professional, responsive, and always explained everything clearly. I highly recommend them.

Mr Shore helped my husband win his social security disability case after a 4.5 year battle. When the case was moved up to the federal level Mr Shore had a great referral of a federal lawyer he knew that also helped us win at the federal level and then the case was remanded back to him and ultimately we won. He was professional, kind, patient, and helpful through the whole process. It took forever, but he stuck with us and rode it out. I believe his connections and knowledge that have been developed through his years and years of experience in the legal system are ultimately what helped us win the case. Thank you Mr Shore!

I called Mr. Shore looking for advice on how to file my SSDI case. He told me that he refused to take my money, that in my situation I could do it myself. He gave me a  number to call & told me if I had any questions along the way he would be happy to answer them. I did call him once & gave them my name, he must have put my name on some kind of list, I got an answer to my question, no problem. Here I am 9 months later approved & will be getting my award letter next week.
Thank you Mr. Shore, you’re a rare find in today’s world! So glad I found you.

Honesty, integrity, knowledge, intellect, kindness, compassion and trust. These are the attributes of David Shore. If you need help filing a disability claim or understanding the process to ensure a successful outcome, David M. Shore is the person you must speak with. Thank you David!

David M. Shore was my representative at my Social Security Disability hearing. I am positive David was the reason I received a favorable decision. I would highly recommend him because he listens, makes you feel comfortable, and is a winner.
A competent attorney and also a wonderful human being who took the time to give me free advice concerning my mother's case. Many thanks !

I reached out to David Shore 2 years ago to appeal my SSDI denial and I just got the outcome that I wanted.  Social security made us jump through every hoop and really drug out the process and I am glad that David and his law office kept at it with me. If I had chosen someone else as my lawyer I am not sure I would have gotten anything from SSDI.

Absolutely the worst.....11 messages with his receptionist and 6months later i have still not heard from David or his team, i had to get help from another lawyer to answer  my questions... he doesnt have the respect to call his client for any updates or even a how are you! Several times i had to hide my number jus so his office picks up the phone!  B.A.R said yes i can fire him and send them a copy of his bill....THANKS FOR NOTHING DAVID!!!

I recently got a consultation from David Shore regarding SSDI. He is incredibly knowledgeable and knows his field like the back of his hand. He explained all my options and the best course of action for my specific situation. He was straight to the point, intelligent, and clearly an ethical lawyer with integrity!
If you think you have a Social Security disability claim - he's the guy to contact!
(Thank you David Shore!)

My wife and I spent nearly 2 years dealing with David Shore and my wife got a favorable decision on her SSDI case from an ALJ. David is a patient, compassionate, capable, attorney. My wife is scared to death to talk to people and he put her at ease. Some peoples review on here will complain that they don't get the best communication from his staff, but you have to realize that this office is dealing with A LOT of cases and don't have all day and night to hold everyone's hand and give constant updates. Some people just have no patience, and this process takes a while. We've spent from early Feb 2023 until Mar 2025 and we're still waiting for backpay and regular SSDI payments. This stuff doesn't happen overnight. We are grateful to David and his staff and are absolutely blown away at how much work they put into this without any pay until you win the case. This man and his team are a blessing!

I contacted the Law Office of David M. Shore to see if they could assist with my Social Security case. While they couldn’t take on my case since it was an administrative dispute rather than a legal one, Attorney David Shore still took the time to listen and offer valuable recommendations. He even called me back the same day, which I truly appreciated.

He quickly understood my concerns, even without knowing every detail of my situation, and suggested I contact my state representative to help get the answers I’ve been struggling to obtain from the Social Security Office. While some Social Security staff have been helpful, many have made the process more difficult or refused to escalate my claim and situation. Attorney Shore acknowledged the financial stress I’m facing and provided a practical path forward, despite not being able to represent me directly.

I truly appreciate his time, insight, and willingness to help. Highly recommend this firm for their professionalism and dedication!

David Shore is so knowledgable, patient, kind and accessible! We never felt rushed or unimportant when discussing our case with him. Thankyou to David and his excellent staff, the process was so much easier than if we tried it on our own. Disability was approved and has changed our lives.
If you’re looking for an attorney, David Shore is  your guy!

Absolutely amazing work, and helped me get my SSI and win my case. Staff there are great and Mr.Shore really gives you a complete understanding of your case and overview. I am so glad and thankful for him and all of this efforts and support.

I had a disability claim that was disallowed and had attorney David Shore represent me,  I was a court reporter for many years and have seen many attorney at work, David Shore followed up with State Disability services, he never gave up and I finally was awarded a great settlement, I highly recommend attorney David Shore
He was able to get me ssdi just by asking one question regarding my ability to work . I will be using him soon to apply for ssi since my other attorney wasn’t able to help .

If I could give David M. Shore 10 stars, I would. Heck, make it 11 just because he's that amazing.

Picture this: I spent almost a year being tossed around by the Social Security Administration like a beach ball at a summer concert. They gave me wrong info so many times, I started thinking they were just improvising at this point. After months of this nonsense, I realized I needed professional help—and no, not that kind of help—an attorney!

Enter David. This guy knows the SSA like he wrote the manual (seriously, are we sure he didn’t?). He’s not just brilliant, though. He’s patient, empathetic, and so kind I’m almost convinced he should be a therapist on the side. From day one, he untangled my mess like a pro, and I only regret not finding him sooner.

Do yourself a favor and call David. You won't regret it.

Davis stuck with me for 3 denials till we won!
I recommend him and his team.

Mr. Shore was able to secure a ssi and ssdi award for me which I really appreciate. He is a very capable lawyer and personable. With that said his office doesn't reply to emails or voice mails. I had to go to ssi office and wait for hours to get answers to questions that I contacted Him about. Good lawyer but bad communication.

Mr Shore accepted my case when other larger firms would not.  He and his team worked very hard on a difficult case with old evidence.  This morning we won my appeal! Thank you very much Mr Shore to you and your team.

I wanted to take this opportunity to thank Mr. Shore, as well as Jamee, from the bottom of my heart, for their professional representation of my disability case. After 2 1/2 years of going thru this difficult process, initially being denied twice due to a previous attorney not representing me properly, I was fortunate to find Mr. Shore. Not only did he help pick up the pieces, but him and his team, with their incredible experience and dedication, managed to turn my case around and won a fully favorable decision. They were always on top of everything, submitted all my records and important documents on time, and were always available to take one on one time with me, and properly communicate with me. I can't even begin to describe how stressful and hard this process has been on me, and they guided me thru it all, all the way to the finish line, something that a lot of other legal representatives don't do. If you are serious about finding someone who cares, and who takes the necessary time to devote to your case, I can't recommend them enough. Thank you guys for never giving up, and showing me what proper disability representation should be. You've helped to change my life for the better, and I couldn't be more appreciative 🙂

Mr.Shore is an amazing attorney and helped me throughout the whole process of my case. He is understanding and has a determination to help others struggling with Social Security. I have recommended him to my family and friends.
The offices are extremely helpful and patient. I can't recommend them more! Thank you for everything, sincerely.
Great
Yep, yep, yep...spoke plainly though I, not necessarily so. He has "earned his Law Degree", by my decree. Good advice for our cases.

David Shore is a nice attorney and help me get my SSI, but a few years later I've called to ask a couple questions and the secretaries were a bit rude and hurried their answers up and incomplete! But yeah I still say they're a good team! Hope you're doing well!

David Shore Got me My S.S.D.I. Seamlessly many years ago-2001.  I was working for U.P.S., Involved in an Accident while on the job. Diagnosis of: Fibromyalgia, R.S.D. & Chronic Fatigue Syndrome, diagnosed back at a time The "powers to be" (Insurance Industry & Social Security), Did Not Fully Understand nor Accept as being Real.  David went down to San Diego, for a Court Hearing, We sat before the Judge for Less than 2 Minutes and, The Social Security Judge Honored the Request (I said Not one word).  I was, and am, Extremely Grateful.  At the time, I had 3 Young Sons (12,10 & 5) with my Spouse who was a Housewife. The Monies Came in when Needed. Thank You David Shore

Omg David and his associates are the absolute best, David just changed my life. He's literally the kindest person and is very open with communication about your case. I absolutely recommend giving them a call if you have any questions about your ssi case or need a lawyer. You won't regret it!
Excellent

David was instrumental in getting my wife's claim to go through. He was very knowledgeable and let us know exactly what steps were next and what to expect. He and his staff are VERY easy to work with.

I have had the pleasure of consulting with Mr. David M. Shore regarding a critical issue of social security disability over payment affecting my social security retirement.  I am a ABA Certified Paralegal via University of San Diego Graduate Program and have no experience in Mr. Shore's field of law.   Not only did Mr. Shore take his valuable time to advise me, he listened, he gave me direction, he called me back, he followed up and his advise lead directly to positive results with the Social Security Administration today in obtaining an informal conference.  Mr. Shore told me exactly what forms I needed to complete to navigate a sometimes overwhelming bureaucracy.  I am amazed at the kindness and expert knowledge imparted to me today.  I am forever grateful.  All this was done at no charge.

I contacted 15 different attorneys last year searching for someone to represent my family member before an Administrative Law Judge for Social Security Disability.  They had been trying to handle this on their own without adequate support.  This was their FINAL APPEAL!!
Mr.Shore actually took the time to listen...thank God.  During the lead up to their hearing he obtained the necessary documentation from the medical experts my family member had been seeing.  The hearing ended with the Judge awarding the disability claim.

What is experience without character, nothing!  Mr. Shore has both!  An expert in his field after many years experience and of the highest degree in quality character!

I've experienced the other mill-like attorneys, and you aren't a number to Mr. Shore.  You will encounter a very pleasant expert who is personable, understanding and cares to take time with you.

He makes sure he remembers who you are and everything necessary about you and your case!  His staff is as wonderful, of course... Eagles soar with Eagles!

At no time did I ever encounter a moment in my case where I felt upset by his work, much to the opposite, he gave me complete peace of mind!

I will surely and always highly recommend Mr. DAVID SHORE to anyone and everyone I encounter who are I need of his services.

David shore was my attorney for two years.  He was negligent incompetent and unprofessional and an absolute nightmare.  I want to warn anyone who is trying to decide whether or not to use him for an attorney to run.  If I could give zero stars I would absolutely give zero.  I had to start over with another attorney and I wasted two years with him.  He didn't send in all my important medical records, I wasn't prepared for the court hearing with the judge, he didn't turn in paperwork, and his staff was rude and nasty.  He delayed some paperwork and I was starting to think he was dragging out my case so he could get more money.   I believe I was denied because of his incompetence and negligence.  You will be better off by yourself instead of having him help you and he's absolutely useless.  I believe he shouldn't practice law and I am in the process of making a complaint against his license.  Instead of reading the 5 stars go straight to the one star reviews and that's the experience you will likely have.  He should be ashamed of himself for treating disabled people absolutely poorly.  Once I started realizing how incompetent he was he started ignoring my calls.  It wasn't until I threatened to sue him and come after his license he started talking to me. He is in over his head and doesn't know what he's doing so find another attorney.  Make sure you do your homework or you will end up with an attorney like him.  I don't do reviews but if I can help one person from repeating my mistake it will be worth the time I lost writing this review!

I am so grateful for choosing David shore to represent me when applying for disability. After being denied twice, i decided to look for a attorney and thank god i was able to find him. He was very helpful and communicated everything in a way for me to understand. I couldnt have done it without him and for that i am truly grateful!

Winner! Winner! Winner! After being denied Disability insurance twice I was hopeless and felt domed.  I gave it one last try this time with an attorney.  I chose Mr. David M. Shore due to his lengthy experience and the professionalism, I discovered when speaking with him. He assured me he couldn’t guarantee a win but he did guarantee me he would present the court with the best possible case on my behalf. Well like my opening say’s I put my trust with attorney David M. Shore and I highly recommend going with him, I know I wouldn’t have been able to do it without his help. Winner! Winner! Winner!

I wish I could give Mr. Shore 10 stars! When I became disabled and was no longer able to work, I didn't know what to do or where to turn. I was fortunate enough to find David Shore. He gave me so much help and awesome advice. Not only is he extremely knowledgeable about Social Security Disability procedures, he is able to cut through the red tape and explain everything in a way I could understand. It is obvious how much he cares. He is a true advocate for his clients. If you are trying to navigate the Social Security system and need help, don't hesitate to call his office. I wholeheartedly recommend him. David Shore is an awesome attorney and awesome human!

David, Jamee and all his staff were very kind and helpful! They went above and beyond to help one of our family members with a unique disability be successful in getting the help he needed. They responded to our questions thoughtfully and thoroughly.

I called the Law Office of David Shore with questions I had regarding SSDI  Mr. Shore took the phone call and answered all of the questions I had.  He was knowledgeable, professional and set my mind at ease.  Thank you kindly sir.  I value your time and expertise!!!
The Law Offices of David M Shore provided professional services.  He is assuring and provided an easy process for my case. I have already referred him to Family and friends.

I could not have been more pleased. Mr Shore was with me every step of the was. When I Called with questions he researched my inquiry and got back an immediate response. i would recommend Mr Shore to anyone in
need of an excellent layer. Thank You Mr Shore and Jamie

How he got all these high ratings is beyond me. I wish I could give zero stars. Wasted many years with this joke. Showed up to an office looking like daycare. Secretary running around trying to babysit making me wait a long time and mix up my paystubs from a very old job. Told her how important it was to keep them in order. Never asked about me. Went to court. Yes, I was grilled by the judge too while he barely said anything. Felt like I was representing myself. I would've at least done some research if that was the case. F++++ infinity. I wish this was against the law or I could take action besides this. Avoid. Don't listen to the good reviews. See even one experience like mine, why stay?
They helped me get my permanent disability and were very good to deal with
Mr. Shore has helped me get SSI back in 2007....he is a very nice man and I can always count on him when anything pertaining to my benefits come up.

I called this attorneys office with a buisness legal issue and from the beginning the attorney sounded uninterested. He didnt state his name and claimed that my remedy is I should quit doing business.  Sad. Im am so glad God allowed me to earn a paralegal certificate .Its a start. I work with attorneys and have won pro se cases earning over $35,000 in one case against a major company.  I would not recommend this unethical and more than likely greedy law firm ti anyone.

When I needed legal counsel, I looked for one that did not necessarily have warm and fuzzy reviews but with a tinge of frustration because of the perceived bravado from the lawyers.  I met Atty Bob Fuselier who was straightforward and minced no words, and precisely one I would want to represent me.  Fierce to defend the truth and very knowledgeable.   I ended up working with him and his partner, "seemingly"  soft spoken Atty David Hart.  I had the best team, extremely efficient, highly professional and absolutely a winning team.  We persevered because Atty Hart was calm, cool, collected but  tenacious to uphold my rights. I will always be grateful.  If I am to choose between a cute pug or pit bull,  the latter would be my automatic choice to protect me. Oh, I love both breeds as my father has a pit bull and a pug is my dream dog.  Thank you, BLG.  You are awesome!

They may be good lawyers and I can handle being told what I didn't want to hear about my case but just had my initial free consultation with Robert Fuselier who I found condescending, impatient, cut me off repeatedly, got angry when he cut me off trying to answer his last question with another question and I tried to finish the first question, in a big hurry to get out of there and told me one thing at the beginning and something completely different at the end. I got the impression that 2 pm on a Friday before a holiday weekend was not the best time to be there. Will take any future business elsewhere.
Petrov personal injury lawyers is outstanding team, professional, compassionate, responsive, knowledgeable, and truly fought for my best outcome.

I had an outstanding experience with Daniel Petrov as my attorney following my car accident. Over the course of 1.5 years, Daniel consistently went above and beyond what I expected from legal representation.

What impressed me most was his proactive communication, he regularly updated me on my case’s progress without me having to ask, which gave me tremendous peace of mind during a stressful time. Beyond just handling the legal aspects, Daniel genuinely cared about my well-being and checked in on me personally after my accident to make sure I was okay.

Daniel has a remarkable ability to explain complex legal processes in terms that are easy to understand. He kept me well-informed every step of the way, including thoroughly preparing me for my deposition and other important milestones. I never felt left in the dark about what was happening with my case.

His professionalism, dedication, and genuine care for his clients sets him apart. I’m very satisfied with the outcome of my case and would highly recommend Daniel Petrov to anyone needing legal representation after an accident.

Nothing is more frustrating than dealing with an insurance company when you’re in an accident. Daniel and his team help in explaining the steps and processes of getting what you deserve. I highly recommend them for getting a resolution that you’re happy with.

Petrov Law Firm will walk with you every step of the way to get what you deserve - sadly I’ve been thru a few car accidents living in Los Angeles, the firm makes you feel like you’re the only one they are helping, they’re always reachable and will explain the process and timeline. I had great outcomes with all of my cases thanks to Petrov Law Firm, they deal with insurance and your doctors!

Thank you very much for taking the time to leave such an outstanding 5-star review for the Law Office of Bradley Corbett – Vista. We truly appreciate your trust, your kind words, and the opportunity to represent you. Providing high-level, results-driven criminal defense in Vista and throughout North San Diego County is something we take extremely seriously, and feedback like yours reinforces why we do this work.

Our Vista office proudly serves clients facing criminal charges in Vista, San Marcos, Escondido, Oceanside, Carlsbad, and surrounding San Diego County courts. We understand that an arrest or criminal accusation—whether it involves a felony or misdemeanor, DUI, domestic violence, theft, drug charges, probation violations, or other serious criminal allegations—can turn someone’s life upside down. From the very first consultation, our goal is to reduce that stress by providing clarity, honesty, and a strong defense strategy tailored to the facts of the case.

Attorney Bradley Corbett brings nearly two decades of experience handling criminal defense cases in Vista and North County San Diego, including extensive work in the Vista Courthouse and surrounding jurisdictions. Familiarity with local judges, prosecutors, law enforcement practices, and court procedures in Vista, San Marcos, Escondido, and Oceanside allows our firm to anticipate issues early and position cases for dismissals, reductions, or favorable resolutions whenever possible.

What truly distinguishes our Vista criminal defense office is our hands-on, client-centered approach. We believe that anyone searching for a Vista criminal defense attorney deserves direct communication with their lawyer—not a case manager—and a clear explanation of their options at every stage of the process. Each case is carefully examined for weaknesses in the prosecution’s evidence, constitutional violations, unlawful searches or seizures, unreliable witness statements, and procedural errors that can lead to suppressed evidence or outright dismissal.

Many of our clients come to us feeling overwhelmed, uncertain, and worried about their future. Whether someone is dealing with a San Diego DUI arrest, a domestic violence accusation in Vista, a drug offense in San Marcos, a theft or fraud charge in Escondido, or a probation or warrant issue in Oceanside, we approach every case with the same level of urgency and preparation. We prepare as if every case is going to trial, even when resolution outside the courtroom is the goal—because preparation creates leverage.

Your review reflects exactly what we strive to deliver: professionalism, responsiveness, and aggressive criminal defense advocacy. We know that the outcome of a criminal case can affect employment, family, immigration status, and future opportunities, which is why we fight relentlessly to protect our clients’ rights and reputations throughout San Diego County.

Thank you again for recommending the Law Office of Bradley Corbett – Vista. Your review not only means a great deal to our team, but it also helps others searching for a trusted Vista criminal defense lawyer or North County San Diego criminal defense attorney feel confident reaching out for help. If you ever need legal guidance in the future—or if a friend or family member needs experienced criminal defense representation in Vista, San Marcos, Escondido, or Oceanside—we are always here to help.

We are grateful for the opportunity to serve our community and to stand up for our clients when it matters most.

Criminal Defense Attorney Serving Vista, San Marcos, Escondido & Oceanside

He exudes confidence without being overbearing, knowledge supported with personal life experiences, and integrity and honesty.  Mr.Dang took the time to listen to my needs and issues. He was genuinely sincere and not going through the motions, and he did not come across as being mechanical in his presentation as some attorneys tend to be. He made me feel like he really cared about me and my family, and he is a straight shooter, letting me know the degree of difficulty my case can/could be.  What impressed me the most was when Attorney Dang told me he has not lost a case to date. He will let you know up front whether or not he can handle your case.  In addition, he lets you know his fees, and allows monthly payments.  I sincerely and wholeheartedly recommend Attorney Dang for your Immigration needs!

When I first walked in I was really nervous because I wasn't sure what to expect since I haven't gone to many attorneys at all, I just have heard some in the radio. The attorney told me about the law and proceeded to ask me detailed questions to see if I would qualify. After filling out a form and many questions he let me know that I unfortunately did not qualify for deferred action and he told me the reasons but gave me some advice to make sure I would be ready in case there was a new way for me to petition for a case. He told me that the most important thing for me at this point was to continue with school and keep a clean record. Even though I was really disappointed that I am not eligible for deferred action, I am happy that I went to him and got an honest answer. He gave me bag with more information about the requirements on qualifying for deferred action and other useful immigration information. Whenever there is someone that needs some immigration help, I always refer them to him because I know he is not just after money and will tell them the truth.

She walked me through the details of what would happen, and when it came time to talk with the lender to verify details, she was there to support. She stayed in touch to let me know what was going on along the way, and celebrated with me when our loan was approved with modifications.

Lisa was instrumental in saving our home from foreclosure. We are so thankful for firms like yours, and people like you who care and want to help when we are in a bind.

But instead he gave me hope and assured me they would win our case and stop our home from being sold! Within a month he managed to help us. And he and Rosevelt law did all the hard work for us and all we did was do what we were told which was to send paperwork and pay when it was time to pay. The whole process was nerve wrecking since this is the first time we go through this, but Anthony and Lynette did an amazing job of answering any questions. even if they were dumb ones lol. I retained Joni Eisenstein to represent me in a serious traffic matter with substantial potential consequences. From the outset, she demonstrated a clear mastery of the law, the court process, and the practical realities of how these cases are handled. Her approach was strategic, disciplined, and confidence-inspiring, which immediately put me at ease.

I am absolutely thrilled to write this glowing 5-star review for Peter Liss, who skillfully represented me as a criminal defense attorney, resulting in the dismissal of my case. From the moment I first consulted with Peter, he displayed a level of professionalism, expertise, and dedication that inspired confidence and eased my worries during such a distressing time in my life.

Peter's knowledge of the law and his commitment to his clients' defense is unparalleled. He demonstrated an exceptional understanding of the intricate legal details surrounding my case, leaving no stone unturned when investigating and building my defense strategy. His attention to detail and relentless pursuit of justice were evident every step of the way.

What sets Peter Liss apart from others in his field is not just his robust legal knowledge but also his exceptional ability to listen and communicate with his clients. He took the time to listen earnestly to my concerns, offered clear explanations, and made sure that I was always informed and involved throughout the process. Knowing that I had a dedicated advocate on my side was incredibly reassuring.

Furthermore, Peter's courtroom presence is truly remarkable. He exudes confidence, backed by extensive experience, which undoubtedly made a strong impression on the presiding judge and prosecution. His persuasive arguments and impeccable case presentation played a pivotal role in securing the ultimate dismissal of my case.

Additionally, I greatly appreciated Peter's regular and prompt communication. He consistently kept me informed about the progress of my case, promptly responded to my inquiries and always made himself available when I needed guidance or reassurance. His reliability and accessibility provided immense comfort during an otherwise stressful period.

In summary, Peter Liss is an exceptional criminal defense attorney who exceeded all my expectations. His expertise, professional demeanor, and unwavering commitment to defending his clients are truly outstanding. If you find yourself in need of legal defense, I highly recommend Peter Liss without hesitation. He is a remarkable attorney who will fight passionately to protect your rights and secure the best possible outcome for your case.

Once again, thank you, Peter, for your exceptional services and for successfully getting my case dismissed.

I was involved in an automobile accident in California, three thousand miles from home. I knew one person in California, who happened to be a retired state trooper. He recommended that I contact Peter Liss to represent me. That alone should tell you something.

Peter is clearly a talented lawyer, but more importantly, he is a special human being. He was so kind to me, patiently listening to my dilemma, then calmly and methodically describing every potential scenario of my case.

I faced losing my medical practice and the destruction of my career. He advised that I take certain preemptive actions before my case was heard in court. I trusted him explicitly and followed his advice. I discovered that his recommendations, although designed to help my case, made me a more empathetic doctor. Due to Peter's skill and exceptional expertise, the nightmare is over.

Another important element to consider, is that Peter returned every call and every email the same day, often in minutes. This is a true reflection of his compassion, for when you are fearful and traumatized, waiting for a call adds to your anxiety. Peter Liss kept me sane.

Words cannot express my gratitude to Peter Liss. I give him my highest praise and endorsement. With Peter as your advocate, consider yourself blessed.

reviews.ownerResponse:
We do not have any record that you are a client of the firm or had an initial consultation scheduled, however, we are sorry to hear you were disappointed with your experience. Our firm strives to provide high-quality legal consultations and transparent information about our fees and processes. When a prospective client calls, we want to make sure they are a proper fit with our firm. When we believe the services they are seeking may not be a match with the services we provide, we like to address that up front. We do make referrals when we are able to, however, sometimes we do not have a referral for a particular matter, in which case we refer individuals to the San Diego Lawyer Referral Service where they can be better matched with a lawyer who can handle their specific need.

We wish you all the best.

reviews.text:
My 92 year old uncle, who had just been admitted into hospice care,  had questions about his Will and Living Trust.   The only copy I found in his home was a DRAFT copy.  My uncle had questions about the contents of the Will and Living Trust so I contacted Ryan, explained that her client was in hospice care and reported that a signed copy of the trust could not be found.  She insisted, more than once, that he had a signed copy.  He did not.

Since I could not produce a final copy of the trust, I asked Ryan to meet with my uncle to answer his questions.  She stated that she already had meetings and that she was leaving on Wednesday, July 23rd so she would not be available to meet with him until July 30.  She also stated that I would not be allowed in the room when they met.  My request was for her to meet with my uncle and I never intimated or suggested that I would be present.  (However, my understanding is that my presence would be a decision my uncle/her client could make)  It is her failure to respond to the request of a client in hospice that is troubling.

I have been my uncle's fiduciary for the last four years.  I do know that in April of 2024 he gave Ryan $7000 to draw up his Living Will and Trust.

Not a fan of Ryan Alexeev.
reviews.ownerResponse: Given attorney-client privilege, I am only allowed to speak to the client, and only the client can waive that privilege.
