reviews.text: Kurt Permito is EXCELLENT! Do yourself a favor and hire his team- you won't regret it.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Ruthy. We’re thrilled to hear your experience with Kurt Permito and his team was excellent. Your recommendation means a great deal to us.

reviews.text: Of course my attorney.

Mr. Domercq has been with my divorce case from practically the very beginning, and his consistency, accessibility, and depth of knowledge have made a real difference.  He’s highly experienced, extremely sharp in depositions and cross-examinations, and brings a confident, effective courtroom presence when it matters most. If you’re facing false accusations in a custody case, he’s the person to speak to. Widely respected in North County and within the San Diego Bar community, I couldn’t recommend him more.

I can’t say enough about the great things that Pierre’s has done for me with his representation. During one the most difficult times of my life Pierre litigated a complex restraining order and counter suit for a period of over 3 years. His representation was superb!

Pierre is quick witted, intelligent, tenacious and always prepared, truly a top experienced professional. His staff was extremely detailed and very efficient.

Simultaneously, I was represented by several other divorce attorneys in another state. Since concerns regarding the restraining order action overlapped my divorce Pierre and his staff took on the added task of coordinated with two other legal teams. Pierre and his staff seamlessly navigated the complexities of my restraining order and associated divorce with the other legal firms.

After prevailing on the restraining order Pierre then represented me in a counter suit. His representation was excellent.  Pierre is a real tactician anticipating the potential next moves of the opposition. He is always one step ahead.

I would definitely recommend Pierre and his team. They are by far the best!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Chuck,
Thank you so much for your positive review. I wanted to let you know that it was a pleasure helping you. I am glad your case had such a great outcome. If you have questions or need help in the future please contact us.

reviews.text: Literally the best advice I’ve ever received.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Jeremy,

I am glad we were able to help. If you need anything else, let us know.

reviews.text:
I cannot overstate how incredible Pierre has been throughout my case. His legal strategy is sharp and effective—especially in matters involving domestic violence. What truly sets Pierre apart is that his efforts are genuine and not driven by money. He has an incredible ability to balance strong, assertive advocacy with a sincere commitment to client satisfaction.

Pierre is also personable and compassionate, which brings a sense of calm and confidence during incredibly stressful times. Danna and Rebecca from the legal team are equally impressive! They are sharp, efficient, and consistently go above and beyond, often working after hours to ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

When you’re facing a legal battle, especially one that’s emotionally complex, having a strong, principled team behind you makes all the difference. I truly couldn’t have asked for better representation.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hanna,
Thank you so much for the heartfelt review.

reviews.text:
I cannot speak highly enough of Mr. Domercq and his team. While his services are not inexpensive, the level of expertise, attention to detail, and personalized support I received made every dollar worthwhile. From the very beginning, Mr. Domercq demonstrated deep knowledge of family law, strategic thinking, and a calm, confident demeanor that immediately put me at ease during a difficult and emotional time.

What impressed me most was his ability to clearly articulate my options, anticipate potential challenges, and advocate tenaciously for the best possible outcome. His preparation was thorough, his communication consistently prompt and respectful, and he always made me feel like a top priority. His courtroom presence and strategic guidance were invaluable. It is evident that he genuinely cares about his clients, consistently going above and beyond on my behalf.

Thanks to his guidance and strong representation, I achieved a successful outcome in my case. If you're looking for a high-caliber family law attorney who delivers real results and peace of mind, I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Domercq.

I hired Pierre to represent me in a difficult child custody case, and I truly could not have asked for a better advocate. From day one, he demonstrated a deep understanding of family law and showed genuine compassion for what my child and I were going through.

Pierre took the time to listen, explained every step of the process clearly, and made sure I felt supported throughout. In court, he was confident, prepared, and assertive—presenting my case with care, clarity, and undeniable professionalism.

Because of his dedication and expertise, I was able to secure a custody arrangement that puts my child’s needs first. I’m incredibly grateful and would recommend this law firm to anyone facing a custody battle. You’ll be in excellent hands.

Shout out to the paralegals that’s assisted me along the way.  They were kind, polite, and professional throughout.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Cindy,

I am glad we were able to help you reach your goals. You were a pleasure to represent.

reviews.text: I was more than impre With the quality of representation.  Thank you to the whole team.
reviews.ownerResponse: From the whole team, we are glad we could help.

reviews.text: Pierre Domercq is an outstanding communicator.  I was concerned with the developments of my case that was being handled by a hand-full of other attorneys and he listened to my involved legal ranglings and contacted my legal support and affirmed that my case was being handled properly.  I mostly just wanted an outside 3rd party like Pierre to assure me that I was on the right track and he gave me that assurance.  Thank you Pierre.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am glad we were able to help.

reviews.text: I very highly recommend Pierre Domercq and his team. They handled my case with a high degree of honest professionalism and attention to detail with as good of a result as could be expected in my case. Pierre has thorough knowledge of the law and  he championed my case with determination and wisdom. He and his team treated me with kindness and saw me through one of the most difficult times in my life.

Pierre has the rep as one of the best in San Diego.  He is tenacious, direct, fair and clear.  Divorce is an arcane process that takes a while to understand, with complex processes and lots of detailed work (all done while you're limited mentally by emotion).  It requires experience and *effort* by the attorney and unfortunately I used several who were just plain lazy and did as much harm as good.  It was a mistake not using Pierre from the beginning.  Too many things were left open to interpretation, uncertainty and abuse.  I should have started here.

I highly recommend Pierre Domercq.  He has helped me twice with legal guidance.  He is extremely personable, intelligent and dedicated to his clients.  He has twice been able to steer me in a direction to avoid litigation.  Not often you find and attorney with such ethics.  Hopefully we never need his assistance again but if ever do,  I know exactly where I would go.  Also want to give a shout out to his very efficient, friendly and capable staff.
Pierre Domercq is a pleasure to work with.  His knowledge of the law is outstanding and he is passionate about representing his clients.  Just work with Pierre and you will be happy you did.
Pierre is awesome!

This is the second time that I have used Mr. Domercq. The first time was with spouse #2 and he created a successful outcome. The second time was a consultation regarding a divorce with spouse #3.
Mr. Domercq is very personable, relatable and extremely knowledgeable. He also has a good sense of humor, but at the same time is very professional.
He really listened to my situation and determined that for my particular case I didn't need to pay the expense of a lawyer of his caliber. He answered all of my questions and then gave me a recommendation to another attorney that would help with an inexpensive filing instead.
I'm again impressed by Mr. Domercq. He assessed my particular situation (amicable divorce) and suggested what was best for me.
At the end we discussed that I had a small credit with him from my previous case. He said that their firm had gone through two accounting systems since I had been there last, and asked how much the credit was for. I couldn't remember for sure, but it was an amount less than the consultation fee. He said that we would consider it even. What an awesome gesture.
Because it was such a positive experience I asked if I could give him a hug before leaving. He said that he was a hugger and yes.
I have worked with several other lawyers before finding Mr. Domercq, and I'm glad that I found him. He has fulfilled and exceeded my expectations.

I was referred to Burke & Domercq after using a different attorney who could not get the job done properly. They were finalize everything within a few months. I wish I had them in the first place. It would have several me thousands of dollars and frustration. Highly recommend them!

After 10 years and four-(4) Personal Law Attorneys who could not litigate my case - I was referred to what an Attorney stated as  "one of the best". They were so right! Burke & Domercq are the Best & having them represent you, would give your case the best chance to prevail. I am BEYOND grateful for their care, compassion & consultation that settled my case in my favor!

Rebecca, the outstanding Paralegal, helped me through the process to modify support amd she was wonderful! She has extreme patience that matches her legal skills and that served me well. I highly recommend Domercq and Burke forbsny family law matter!

Pierre and his team are impeccably professional.  He helped increase the time with my kids and am forever grateful.  His guidance is sound on all levels and although at times I did not like to hear the message, he was correct and based in logic and reality in difficult situations.  He had phenomenal rapport with the family court system judges.  Highly recommend Pierre and his team!

Had the opportunity to have Pierre Domercq represent a family member at SD Court he was the most knowledgeable well prepared  and professional attorney we have met in the CA court system for a while. His office staff is very courteous especially his paralegal staff.

I have been a client of Burke & Domercq's since the mid 90's.  This has been the best investment that I made for my legal representation.  Pierre and Dan have always gone above and beyond the scope in order to guide and assist me the.  The staff has been consistently professional, courteous and excellent in their service.

Mr. Domercq and his paralegals are the best around. He is straight forward, professional, and can present your story in the most detailed, accurate, and compelling manner. He knew exactly how to take the information I gave him and decipher what was important to share, all while keeping me updated with the process, my options, and helping me remain calm. He was able to identify when lies were being told and apply the right amount to pressure to get the truth to surface. He is the person you want on your side. All of the staff is friendly and quick to respond to any questions. They have a lovely office and are quick to comfort you with a coffee or water as soon as you enter. On the walls are all kinds of awards for his excellent service in law. I highly recommend Mr.Domercq!
Fantastic

I have used Pierre twice for modifications to my spousal support order. He, Grier King and the entire staff are professional, knowledgeable and proficient. Pierre worked through the disadvantageous issues with the original orders which were not litigated by him, but came to excellent conclusions both times. If you have a family law issue, he's the one to see, you'll be glad you did.
Pierre gave me solid advice!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Tim,
I am glad we could help.

reviews.text: Pierre Domercq is one of the most highly qualified and professional family-law attorneys in the San Diego area. If he had been my first attorney, instead of my last, my savings of time and money would have been tremendous. I recommend him and no other firms.
Excellent explanation of process, great staff, great helping me navigate my options.

Worked with Pierre Domercq, he is very knowledgeable and effective. Also, great paralegals here. They make all the difference in preparing docs properly to keep costs down and keep the process on track.

I would highly recommend Burke & Domercq, APC for your family court representation. They were not only forthcoming and super transparent about my ongoing Family Court case, more importantly they confirmed that my existing attorney led me in the right direction and the response from Burke & Domercq would have been the same. This most probably saved me another small fortune in legal fees.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mark,
I am glad we could help.

reviews.text: From day one, I could tell that Pierre and his team really cared about my case and put a lot of effort into helping me reach my goals.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am happy we were able to obtain your goals.
Penny Carter was never our client.

reviews.text:
If you are looking for The Best, look no further than Pierre Domercq of Burke and Domercq. When I was served with fraudulent divorce papers and learned that my ex husband was trying to obtain full physical and legal custody of our young daughter, despite our verbal agreement of shared custody, I knew 2 things: 1) I was desperate to keep custody of my little girl and 2) Because my ex was going to “play dirty”, I needed the best lawyer, hands down.
Burke and Domercq was recommended to me, and by my first meeting, I knew my case and I were in good hands. My divorce was long, due to continued fraudulent filings from the opposing side, and every step along the way, Pierre was able to bring justice. Pierre represented me with success in each and every aspect of my case. Pierre worked unfailingly on my behalf, advocated for me in and out of the courtroom, secured financial judgements in my favor, fought tirelessly for my daughter and her rights, guided me through the often confusing and always disheartening process of seemingly endless paperwork, and worked successfully to reach a winning resolution in my case. Pierre never let me down. I was never disappointed. Every hearing, every phone call, every new filing, each new event in our case, Pierre handled with success. Pierre took action, got results, and exceeded my every expectation, all along the way. He answered my every question, listened to my every concern, and took time to understand the significant complexities of my case. Pierre and his amazing team guided me through the worst time in my life with such professionalism, knowledge, expertise, and overall excellence that I know I made the right decision in choosing Pierre to represent me in my case. I couldn’t be more grateful to Pierre, this firm, and to all the paralegals and staff for the continued small victories, which lead to ultimate victory in the resolution of my case. Special thanks and acknowledgement to my paralegal, Jennifer, for her work to liaise between myself, Pierre, the court, opposing counsel, outside parties, etc. Jennifer’s professionalism and hard work are exemplary, and her skills and knowledge were a priceless asset.  My case was long and complicated, and Pierre was able to handle it with absolute success. I very highly recommend Pierre to anyone going through a divorce. No one could have better represented me, and choosing him was the best decision I made. I am extremely pleased with the outcome. If you want the best in the business, you want Pierre and his team of highly trained and experienced professionals.

I know Pierre as a fellow attorney, and I can assure you he is a skilled and conscientious litigator.

He is the next best thing to a happy marriage!

When the outcome of your case can affect every member of your family, there is no option for anything but the best. Pierre and his support staff were excellent throughout my case. He took the time to understand all the details and offer the best options. He was also able to get me full legal and physical custody, even though California is pro family. I pray I never have to, but I would certainly choose to use this firm again!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Tazmi,
Thank you for the praise. It was great working with you.

reviews.text:
If you ever come to the place of needing divorce services, this is the firm.  They have the expertise to handle the most challenging cases and understand the need to be Kind, patient and understanding.
I care deeply about the staff who came to represent me in court.

reviews.ownerResponse:
I have never met Jessica Merry. Our office has never represented her and she was never our client in any form or fashion. After searching the San Diego Superior Court's Index, it appears she does not even have a case in San Diego.
Jessica, if you read this I hope you remove your review.
Thanks!

reviews.text: Pierre is a wonderful attorney and has an amazing staff that supports him! He helped me in my divorce and got me more than I could have asked for. He made sure I wasn’t taken advantage of and made me feel so comfortable through out the process. Every time I was worried about something I was able to call and if it was just a technical question one of his wonderful paralegals (Rebecca) was there to answer  and assured me of the process.i have and will continue to recommend Pierre to any and all of my friends who need help!
reviews.ownerResponse: Good to hear we could help.

reviews.text: Pierre is an attorney who is not only honest (which is rare) but will help you in every way he can. Him and his office have worked so diligently for my ongoing case for the past 2 years, and I couldn’t be more grateful. He genuinely cares about what is happening in the case and is always prepared when going into court. I can’t thank him enough for all he’s done for me and would highly recommend him to anyone going through family court.
Shannon, Grier, Mechelle, and Susan I am forever in your debt. Thank you for going to bat and hitting a home run for this single dad. Cheers!

I highly recommend Burke & Domercq, LLP. Pierre and his staff are professional, ethical, efficient, quick to respond and truly care about their clients. I have been a client for 5 years and have full trust in the advice that Pierre provides me and he has never steered me wrong. Pierre is intelligent, quick, and always one step ahead! His staff are dedicated to the cases they are working on and always make me feel like I am a priority. I wish I would have had Pierre on my side when I first started this journey back in 2012 because he is simply THE BEST at what he does! I always feel 100% confident having him in my corner.
Thank you Pierre for everything you did for my nephew. Our family would not have been the same with out you help, guidence, and expertise. Thank you for all you have done and continue to do!

Pierre is amazing. I learned so much from him about this process that eventually I was able to represent myself, but not before Pierre was able to obtain great orders on my case. I highly recommend Pierre to anyone who needs a family law attorney that not only knows what he is doing, but gets great results. Thank you Pierre for your brilliant advocacy. Your help will forever be appreciated.

I worked with Pierre on a very challenging case. His advise, throughout, was top notch. I have worked with a variety of law firms over the years. 95% of the time--not satisfied completely. Burke and Domercq are, with great thanks, in my top 5%.  This firm is a good choice for anyone looking for a successful outcome.

Burke & Domercq is the best family law firm in San Diego and possibly all of Southern California. The entire office is expertly managed and operates like a tightly knit team.

Pierre is an extraordinary attorney. He is brilliant. He is in a class by himself. He is an excellent communicator, a straight shooter, extremely knowledgeable, charming with a great sense of humor, compassionate, and he maintained a laser beam focus on attaining the best possible results for me.

Pierre was a maestro in the courtroom. It quickly became apparent and it was actually fun to watch as he maintained total command throughout the court hearings.

Penni Delagnes is the Senior Paralegal that assisted Pierre with my case.
Penni is amazing, truly gifted. She is more knowledgeable than most attorneys. She has the unique ability to listen, comprehend what is being said, accurately translate and discuss everything in detail with Pierre and other team members. It was always reassuring to have Penni available to communicate with.

Without any reservation, I highly recommend the law firm Burke & Domercq!!!

When I came to Pierre and his associates, it was through a referral from my original council. My divorce had become needlessly overcomplicated, because my voice was still not being heard. I didn't have a voice in my marriage, or when I first appeared in court fighting to protect myself and my children. That changed when I switched council, to Burke & Domercq.  After my first meeting with Sue, another lawyer at the firm, I left their very discreetly located Carlsbad office feeling as if I had found the help and support that I had needed, from the very beginning. I was now part of a team. A team that has worked seemingly tirelessly, to help make my voice heard.
Feeling supported and receiving the handholding(Grier King, and all of the paralegals in the office are patient and phenomenal resources), that I have needed during this very difficult process; as well as helping me stay present for my children, also has given me the confidence to make my own voice heard. The small battles fought in court, in order to win the war, have felt less tedious and frightening, with Pierre by my side. I truly believe that with the exceptional skills of Pierre Domercq, that my family and I, will eventually find a solution to peacefully move forward with our lives.
-LMP
Pierre is the best family law attorney I know!

I give this lady zero stars but I had to enter one to get this posted. She is horrible with communicating and her follow up totally sucks. She does not inform her clients of what's going on with their case and is incapable of meeting important deadlines such as medical appeals. She is the worse referral I have ever had. I would not use this woman ever again and will definitely be speaking with the referral source of where she came from. What a nightmare!!!!

She was excellent. Communicated and explained everything to me all the time.
Very happy with her.
Legitimately the single worst experience I've ever had with an attorney.

I am very happy and satisfied with my settlement outcome and having future medical treatment open is a plus.  Attorney Caroline and her assistant Bianca were great help.  Caroline guided me with professional help and understanding the process. Limos
Very unprofessional and I wouldn't hire her even for my dog. Only out for her own benefit and couldn't care less what her clients needs are. Barracuda my Butt!

Caroline Zinns is very competent~professional, she really knows her stuff, all the rules and regulations! She is very thorough and knows how to get the job done! My constructive feedback is that she can come across as a drill sergeant, a bit condescending at times and a little inpatient with responses when communicating. If you want representation who gets the job done, I would recommend Caroline...Her assistant Bianca is amazing and always available to answer your questions in a timely manner! Thank you both!

The office is now located in Carlsbad off Palomar Airport rd and Melrose Dr. She helped me greatly with a workers comp case and helped me get treatment and compensation. Some cases may take longer but Caroline is steadfast in getting it done. Exemplary skills for sure.
Caroline Zinns was thorough, helpful and got the job done.  I would recommend her to anyone, she’s very knowledgeable, patient, and answered all of my questions.
Caroline is awesome!
Amazing Attorney who will fight for what you deserve...Thank you Caroline Zinns
She is a very thoughtful and fun minded person. My cousin is a judge and a lawyer...they are all douche bags, but I really like this douche bag

I thought I was going to be represented by a professional Attorney, boy was I wrong.  I am changing my rating to one star.  I'm just going to say I'm very disappointed with my outcome of my case and suggest you find another Attorney to represent you.
Worst experience of my LIFE. I suggest you don't use her services!!!

Do yourself the biggest favor imaginable and contact Motorcycle Lawyer Pros in Oceanside the instant you find yourself involved in a motorcycle accident. My experience with them was nothing short of exceptional. Their initial free consultation was comprehensive and insightful, providing me with a clear understanding of my legal options and what to expect. Their responsiveness was astounding. I received prompt replies to all my calls and emails, which was a huge comfort during a time of uncertainty. The team is not only very professional but also possesses proper knowledge of motorcycle law that is truly impressive. They were direct, honest, and very very effective in their approach, and were able to change a potentially disastrous situation into a manageable and ultimately successful one. I highly recommend their services!

10/10 service! After my devastating accident last autumn, I honestly felt like my world had been turned upside down. The physical pain was immense, and the financial worries were even worse. A friend contacted this team of lawyers on my behalf, and they stepped in and became my lifeline. Their team, particularly my assigned case manager, walked me through every single step of the legal process with patience and clarity. They went above and beyond, not only securing a fair settlement for my injuries but also ensuring all my lost wages were reimbursed and even arranging for a suitable rental car while my bike was being assessed. The entire experience, which I initially dreaded, was made remarkably smoother and less stressful thanks to their unwavering support and profound expertise. They fought relentlessly on my behalf, and the positive outcome has truly made a significant difference in my ability to recover and move forward. If youre a rider in a bind, these are the only guys you should call.
reviews.ownerResponse: Motorcycle Lawyer Pros thanks you for the review!

reviews.text: Since my accident left me with significant injuries and my bike severely damaged, the thought of dealing with the legal problems that come with it was daunting. Thankfully, this Motorcycle Lawyer team in Oceanside ensured I didn't have to shoulder that burden. They proactively managed all the legal aspects, allowing me to focus entirely on my recovery. They even went above and beyond by helping me secure a suitable rental car, which was very crucial for maintaining my independence. Seriously, these guys are absolute lifesavers. They successfully negotiated a substantial settlement on my behalf, and I'm now well on my way to full recovery. A huge thank you to the entire team!
reviews.ownerResponse: Motorcycle Lawyer Pros thanks you for the review!

reviews.text: Living in a military town means dealing with out of state drivers who dont understand lane splitting. A tourist clipped my handlebars on the 5, sending me hard into the barricade. These guys didnt just understand the California vehicle code, they also used it to completely dismantle the other drivers claim that I was driving recklessly. Hire them if you need lawyers that actually get the job done
reviews.ownerResponse: Motorcycle Lawyer Pros thanks you for the review!

reviews.text:
I had an incredible experience with Wakefield law. Danielle is knowledgeable, easy to understand & she made it so easy. It felt great to get our affairs in order. She told us… if you don’t have a plan, the state has one for you.
Thank you Danielle.

I was referred to Wakefield Law by the financial advisor I’ve been working with for the last decade so I felt confident settling up a meeting and I’m glad I did. Danielle Wakefieldanswered all my questions, connected the dots and prescribed a path forward which fit my needs perfectly.
I highly recommend Danielle Wakefield.
reviews.ownerResponse: Larry, I loved that we met and shared a favorite hobby/lifestyle!  It was my pleasure to help you.  Take care out there!

reviews.text:
Danielle was so professional, she walked us through the entire process and let us ask as many questions as we wanted to. I feel so confident with her as our trust attorney, she made it so easy for us. We are so grateful we found her. It is a great feeling knowing we have our affairs in order. Our kids will thank us later. 🙏
Thank you Danielle.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Amy. The pleasure was truly mine.

reviews.text:
Danielle helped us with our new wills, setting up a new trust, medical directives, and powers of attorney.  She even set up a pet trust so that our cat would be taken care of if something happened to both of us.

From our first meeting she was courteous and professional, listening to our concerns and answering our questions.   She walked us through all the information we would need to gather, and made everything  as painless and easy as possible.   I especially appreciated her flexibility and patience with our complicated work schedules.

Highly recommended!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words. It was such a pleasure to help your family get an estate plan in place. Peace of mind for everyone!

reviews.text: Danielle is amazing!! She goes above and beyond for her clients!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Jeaninne! I hope you enjoy your finished product!

reviews.text: Danielle is absolutely phenomenal! She has gone above and beyond what was required of her and I can honestly say that she genuinely cares about each client she works with! I’ve had other attorneys before but none with the grit and heart that Danielle has. If you have any needs that she can help with do not hesitate to contact her, you will not be sorry! I will be forever grateful for for all her help and diligence.
reviews.ownerResponse: Rebecca, you are a treasure.  Happy to have helped you and wishing you and your family the best holiday ever!

reviews.text: Danielle Wakefield was wonderful to work with and made the process of creating a  living trust a very good experience!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Diana.  It was such a pleasure to help you and Brian and I'm so thrilled you are both enjoying your new life of retirement!

reviews.text: Danielle has been a wealth of knowledge and strength throughout a very, very difficult problem.  She brought clarity to what we could do to resolve it and saw it through. Even though her part in it has been over for a while, she still checks up with us periodically.  Thank you, Danielle!
reviews.ownerResponse: Alicia, it has been my pleasure and I will continue to check on you as long as you need me.  Take good care and enjoy your holidays.

reviews.text:
Ms. Wakefield guided me through what has been one of the most difficult situations I have ever experienced. She represented me as the plaintiff in a civil lawsuit that I thought would never end. The other side had several powerful lawyers attacking me, but Danielle stood her ground and represented my best interests. She knows the law and her expertise in HOA matters is unsurpassed. I am grateful that I had Danielle on my side which concluded in a settlement just days before trial.

reviews.text: I am a disabled special operations combat veteran and attorney. When I needed an attorney to defend me and my family against an unlawful eviction I was incredibly lucky to find Danielle Wakefield! When the home we were leasing was sold in a foreclosure sale, the new owner immediately began a campaign to intimidate us into leaving so he could flip the house. Initially I was able to ignore and deflect the landlord’s many attempts to get rid of us, but when he attempted to cancel our lease and brought a fraudulent unlawful detainer action against us I knew I was in over my head. Landlord-Tenant law is well outside of my practice area, so I started to look for an attorney to represent us. After meeting with a few underwhelming attorneys we started to lose hope, but then we found Danielle! She is an exceptional attorney! She immediately took over the case and exposed the landlord’s lies and wrongdoing to the court—successfully defending our eviction. Since her decisive victory in the erroneous unlawful detainer action, Danielle has represented us in our suit against our landlord to recover the damages incurred as a result of his actions. Over the last three years I am sure that I have gotten on Danielle’s last nerve more than a few times with my constant questions and unsolicited legal theories, but she has remained professional and steadfast throughout the entire process. I cannot recommend Danielle enough. She is a fierce litigator and unwavering advocate for her clients. We could not have found a better lawyer!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Aaron for these kind words.  I loved helping you and your family and appreciate your service to our country (both in the military and as an attorney!)

reviews.text:
Words can’t express how grateful we are to have had Danielle Wakefield as our attorney! Not only is she extremely knowledgeable, precise and organized, but she deeply cares about her clients and gives over 100%.
We had a nightmare situation and she came to our rescue. We were renting a house, when without notice, it was sold in a foreclosure. The new owners, a billion dollars company, wanted to flip it right away, so they did everything they could to threaten and scare my husband, four kids and me, us out of our home.
We had a 2 year lease already existing, so they didn’t have the right to evict us, but they definitely tried. They threatened us with cash for keys or a lawsuit… told us we’d have an eviction on our records and would never be able to rent again. Then posted a 3-day notice to quite sign, on our front door. Even though we knew we had our rights to stay in our home, we didn’t know how to fight off all the threats.
We then endured a water leak, so we contacted the owners to fix it, but instead of doing the right thing, they served us a 7-day notice to leave, followed by an unlawful detainer lawsuit.
WHAT?
That’s when we found Danielle, and she saved our lives. She took on our case and fought hard  for us, for over two years! She immediately made us feel at ease! She made us aware of our rights, walked us through every step and became the voice for us, that we really needed!!
She is absolutely AMAZING and we feel so extremely blessed we found her and she agreed to represent us. We will forever be so grateful for Danielle and all her hard work.
I would highly recommend her Danielle Wakefield! Not only is she passionate and thorough with a big heart, but she’s a bulldog in the courtroom!
She’s simply… THE BEST!

reviews.text:
I highly recommend Harris Personal Injury Lawyers, Inc. to anyone dealing with the aftermath of a serious accident. My case began in December 2019 and, due to the complexities of the court system and constant defense delays, only concluded in November 2024.

My attorneys, Dan Jones and Ranger Wiens, along with my paralegals, Elizabeth and Yesenia, were phenomenal throughout this five-year journey. They saw me through two surgeries and provided constant communication and support during the entire process. I never would have successfully navigated the endless "hoops" required to get the medical care I needed in a timely manner without their constant advocacy.

This process was incredibly stressful. By the time I accepted a settlement in late 2024, I was mentally, physically, and spiritually exhausted from the cycle of preparing for trial only to have it pushed back yet again. What I appreciated most was that Dan and Ranger truly wanted to go to trial for me. They felt I deserved significantly more than the settlement amount and were ready to fight for it in court.

Ultimately, I chose to settle for my own peace of mind, but knowing I had attorneys who were genuinely "all in" and frustrated by the delays alongside me made all the difference. They are a team of high integrity who will stay in the trenches with you for the long haul. If you want a firm that is communicative, dedicated, and ready to fight, this is the team to call. THANK YOU, HARRIS PERSONAL INJURY LAWYERS!
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Jennifer, thank you so much for your kind words! We’re glad our personal injury team was able to support you through your case. Providing responsive and professional legal representation is always our priority. If you ever need a personal injury attorney again, we’re here to help.

reviews.text: Hi my name is Filiberto Canseco, I hired Harris Personal Injury Lawyer's after a car accident. Initially I tried to deal directly with the insurance company of the 2 vehicles that hit me. Nothing was getting done, and the medical bills were piling up. After contacting Harris, the friendly staff walked me through the process and fought for my case with extreme results. At first Geico, one of the insurance company, only wanted to repair my truck, but not take care of my broken shoulder or the therapy.  The other insurance company of the 2nd driver didn't even answer my calls. After hiring Harris, not only did they make sure my truck was back to its original condition, but they paired me up with great doctors, physical therapy, and the best part, they fought both insurance companies to make sure I received the maximum amount of compensation. Thank you Harris Personal Injury Lawyer's!!

reviews.text: This law firm was a great choice. Unfortunately having 2 car accidents, I was fortunate each time to have Harris Personal Injury lawyers make sure I got what was owed to. I would recommend them to anybody in need of a dedicated lawyers! Shout to Tanya and Vanessa who handle everything without a delay!
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Marquita, thank you for trusting us with your car accident case. We’re happy to hear you felt supported throughout the process. Helping clients recover compensation after an accident is exactly why we do what we do. Thanks again.

reviews.text: Best decision I ever made was hiring Palmer Zad & Associates during my divorce last year. I worked with Kestlyn, Layla and Mathew at different points. I can’t say enough about all three. Divorcing a Lawyer is a really painful process and these guys made me fell supported every step of the way. I would strongly recommend Palmer, Zad & Associates to anyone in need of Legal support.

I can never recommend or thank Matthew and Layla enough. I went through the most traumatic high conflict divorce and not only are they excellent at what they do, but they supported me along the way. We had a HUGE  win even though my ex spent almost double. I trust them with my life!!!!
Thank you Matthew and Jordon for updating my Trust. All problems and questions were resolved. Thanks again.

I would like to thank Layla and Autumn for always being patient with me and doing their best throughout my case.

I had a case with them in 2018, and after I moved, I never hesitated to return to this amazing team when I needed an attorney again. They are truly incredible  they’ve never steered me wrong, they genuinely care, and they always offer honest guidance. I felt heard throughout the entire process, and I will continue coming back.

Palmer, Zad & Associates will always be my go-to people thank you to Layla Zad and Autumn.
Matthew earns 5 stars. Easy to work with and explains everything to give you the piece of mind you and your family are thoroughly protected.
Matthew earns 5 stars. Easy to work with and explains everything to give you the piece of mind you and your family are thoroughly protected.

Matthew,
My retention of your services allowed me to resolve the differences between my ex and I...powerhouse!
Thank you

My family has used Matthew Palmer for several Living Trusts and associated documents over the years. Each time everything was handled in a professional manner and the entire staff has been great.  I highly recommend them.

Layla,  Matt Ryan and Matthew Palmer: my family and I are forever grateful for you and your hard work. I had a move-away and they all helped my son and I to relocate during a very hard custody battle. We are now at peace and moving on with the law on our side. Thank you , thank you. God bless you all. BH

Dylan Beatty was an outstanding paralegal who kept me informed throughout my divorce process. He took the time to educate me on all my legal options, which allowed me to move forward with my divorce even while my ex tried to prolong other proceedings. Dylan’s professionalism, knowledge, and dedication truly stood out. He will undoubtedly make an excellent lawyer, and I highly recommend him to anyone seeking a competent and determined attorney who will fight for them.

Don’t waste your time with this place… simply because they’re a waste of time. They also give out false information and help people lie on their legal documents which in turn gets their clients in trouble.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Kayla,

We’re sorry to hear you feel this way. However, your consultation did not proceed because a conflict of interest was identified before any legal advice or services were provided. As a result, no legal guidance or document preparation occurred.

We want to assure you that our firm operates with integrity and adheres to all ethical and legal standards. The statements in your review do not reflect the actual circumstances.

Palmer Rodak & Associates

reviews.text:
I was fortunate to have Mathew Palmer & Associates assist me through my divorce this past year 2025.

They were extremely professional and handled everything in a timely and efficient manner.

Autumn, my paralegal was there  to always take my phone calls and she would dedicate her individual expertise and time guiding  me through the process.
If I had any questions, she would always get back to me and answer any questions that may arise.

I would not hesitate to recommend Mathew Palmer & Associates for your legal needs.  They successfully worked as a team to get me the results that I needed to move ahead from my divorce.

I followed Matt Coderre from another firm because he’s honest, humble, and realistic. He doesn’t sugarcoat things — he tells you the truth and gives solid guidance. He’s easy to talk to and truly cares about his clients. The paralegals are excellent and always on top of everything, and the firm does their best to keep costs down. Thanks to Matt and his team, I was able to regain custody and bring stability back to my kids’ lives. Highly recommend!

Palmer Rodak & Associates — A Team That Fights for the Truth

I cannot thank Matthew Palmer, Matthew Coderre, Autumn Osborn, and the entire team at Palmer Rodak & Associates enough for what they’ve accomplished on my behalf. My case involved extremely serious and false allegations in a Domestic Violence Restraining Order (DVRO) proceeding — allegations that, if believed, could have permanently damaged my reputation, my parental rights, and my relationship with my children.

From the moment I retained them, Matthew Palmer and his team treated me with respect, empathy, and absolute professionalism. They understood not only the legal complexities of my case, but also the human toll that false accusations take. Mr. Palmer led with both strength and composure, never losing sight of the facts or the bigger picture. His courtroom strategy was precise and intelligent — not reactionary or emotional — and it showed.

Matthew Coderre, the associate attorney on my case, was meticulous in his preparation, organization, and knowledge of the law. His calm confidence and eye for detail were invaluable in building a defense that dismantled the opposing party’s claims one by one.

Autumn Osborn, my paralegal, was the glue that held everything together. She was organized, responsive, compassionate, and tireless in ensuring that every document, exhibit, and court filing was perfectly prepared and submitted on time. Her communication was excellent and helped keep the process as stress-free as possible.

When the day finally came, their preparation and professionalism were undeniable — and the truth prevailed. The court dismissed the TRO after seeing through the inconsistencies and lack of evidence in the false allegations. It was a vindication not only legally, but personally.

In a legal system that too often rushes to judgment, Palmer Rodak & Associates stood firm for due process and truth. They restored my faith that fairness and integrity can still exist in family court.

If you’re facing false allegations, a restraining order, or any family law battle that threatens your rights or reputation, there is no team I would trust more than Palmer Rodak & Associates. They don’t just represent you — they fight for you, believe in you, and stand by you every step of the way.

— Christopher Wyatt

I had a very mentally draining case with my ex wife and I didn’t know where to turn. Matt Coderre gave me a call and he handled everything professionally and he was always there when I needed him. Matt is super personable and makes you feel comfortable under stressful situations. Matt resolved every problem that I had with the best outcome and I will never go anywhere else with family law. Thank you for everything you’ve done for me Matt. Matt has changed my life for the better and I can’t thank him enough!

First time I came across Palmer Rodak & associations I was intrigued and had hope seeing their reviews . I made an appointment to meet with them and see how they can help me with my family case . They were friendly, honest and I just had a great feeling about them. I have now  hired them onboard to help me with my case and they been a great help always attentive and answering all my questions. I truly appreciate their honesty and commitment to each case they work on. I would highly recommend them to help your cases as well. I have told them my bad experience I had hiring an attorney so blindly and they reassured me they don’t have the same work methods as the previous lawyer .

My only regret is not finding Layla Zad sooner. After a frustrating and disappointing experience with two prior law firms, I was feeling defeated. My case had been dragging on since it was filed in September 2022. I found Layla in the fall of 2024 as I was preparing for an important upcoming hearing—and that’s when everything changed.

Layla was incredibly professional, efficient, and hardworking. She truly is an encyclopedia when it comes to family law. Her knowledge, attention to detail, and commitment to my case gave me the confidence and support I had been lacking for so long.

Thanks to Layla and the team at Palmer Rodak & Associates, my case was finally brought to the finish line. I am deeply grateful for their dedication and highly recommend Palmer Rodak & associates to anyone in need of a strong, reliable family lawyer. Look no further and just hire them.

I needed a lawyer. I seeked advice and was highly recommended Palmer Rodak and Associates. I was losing out on time with my children. Being involved in my children's life has no price. I paid my retainer and Layla Zad became my attorney and she did not let me down. Layla was able to discredit and expose lies while addressing the withholding of my children that felt endless. Quick summary, I was granted by court majority physical custody of my children. 2nd court was DCSS. I thought it would be an easy childsupport calculation. I started the process on my own to save money. I became custodial parent and still DCSS would have me run around with re-application for modification and multiple continuance in court. I was wasting time. I called the reliable law firm again. I spoke with Dylan Beatty and Matthew Palmer a power team. My next court hearing started with a shock were the court was confused and almost had me continue to pay other parent. Thank goodness Matthew and Dylan file documents prior. Matthew made sure the courts re-review those documents to correct their error. Finally, no more run around, no longer have to pay, and will receive money back.
I highly recommend Palmer Rodak and Associates law firm.

Attorney Layla Zad is a miracle worker!! I have been in a court system for almost 4 years with no promising outlooks of settling with my ex-husband. She got it done in one sitting and was able to finalize our divorce and assets that day!! She is amazing and I highly recommend her if you want to get things done. She truly has a gift for what she does!

Absolutely five stars for Matthew Palmer and his team! From the very first consultation, he was kind, professional, and truly listened to my concerns. He made an incredibly stressful and emotional situation feel manageable and gave me real confidence throughout the entire process. His expertise and dedication were clear every step of the way, and thanks to his hard work, my move-away request was granted. I couldn't have asked for better representation. If you're looking for a lawyer who genuinely cares and delivers results, Matthew Palmer is the one you want in your corner. A big thank you to Autumn, his paralegal. She was a huge support through this whole process as well and answered every question along the way.

Matthew is the best lawyer I’ve ever worked with. I hired Matthew Palmer to write a will and trust. He is kind, smart, attentive and exceedingly thorough. I highly recommend Matthew Palmer because he simply cares.

Both Matthew Palmer and Matt Coderre are great attorneys'! Them and their staff are responsive and will give you the best outcome. If your case(s) are messy whether it's custody or restraining orders these guys will help you get what you want to receive. I think this firm is worth the money you pay and they offer payment plans.
Thank you so much Matthew and Matt.. you are guys are awesome!

I was completely overwhelmed, but Matthew Coderre helped me through it—not just legally, but mentally and emotionally as well. He was supportive, sharp, and fully committed at every step. His only goal was to see me succeed through an incredibly difficult situation.

I’ll always recommend this firm because they fight the right way—honestly, respectfully, and with true collaboration. I’m extremely grateful I chose Palmer Rodak & Associates, and even more so for Matthew Coderre’s expertise in family law. His dedication made all the difference.

I knew my divorce was going to be contested and complicated. Before I filed, I did quite a bit of research and interviewed multiple attorneys.

From the initial consultation, I could tell Layla was the one to retain. From the filing of the first papers to receipt of the Divorce Decree, Layla and her team provided timely advice and measured responses.

In court, Layla was always prepared, confidant and efficiently rebutted opposition.

In the end, I am more than satisfied with both the outcome of my case and the rest of the Palmer Rodak team.

I highly recommend the firm!
Honestly, the best attorney I could've found.

Matthew Coderre represented my son in a DV/ custody case involving my grandson. Matt is very humble, caring, and compassionate. Along with that, he spent ample hours reviewing documentation and evidence to present in our case. He didn’t sugar coat
anything or give us false hope. Rather he was open and honest with us about what we were facing and very well educated. When our day in court came, Matt fought with everything he had to plead our case. We had a very victorious win and to Matt I am truly grateful. We have our grand baby back thanks to Matt. You can’t go wrong having Matt on your side.

Attorney Layla Zad is incredibly knowledgeable, patient, and fair. She  took the time to explain each step of the mediation process, provided valuable legal insights, and helped us navigate complex issues. She maintained a neutral stance while encouraging productive discussions, which ultimately led to an agreement that worked for both of us.

What I appreciated most was her  ability to diffuse tension and keep us focused on finding solutions rather than getting stuck in conflicts. Thanks to her guidance, we were able to avoid the lengthy and costly litigation process, reaching an amicable resolution efficiently.

If you’re looking for a skilled, compassionate, and highly effective divorce mediator, I wholeheartedly recommend Attorney Layla Zad. Her professionalism and dedication truly made a difficult time in my life much more manageable.

Thank you Layla for your outstanding work!

I am so thankful to have the entire staff at Palmer & Rodak by my side during a very difficult and scary time trying to navigate through a separation/divorce. From the first consultation, Matthew took great concern to listen to me, took detailed notes and offered me several options on moving forward. I definitely felt I was more than a client and every staff member made me feel important and secure. Having a trustworthy lawyer by my side made the entire process much easier to navigate. The entire staff was there for me every step of the way. Everyone was honest, upfront, extremely organized and had a very clear concise communication with me. Palmer & Rodak gave me a calming easy experience through a very difficult time. I am so thankful to have been represented by them, especially Matthew!

Hiring an attorney can feel like a daunting task especially for custody disputes. From the moment I sat down to consult with Matt  Coderre, he put me at ease and listened intently to all of my concerns. Matt took the time to fully understand my situation and keep me informed throughout every turn of events (and there were many). He called me back promptly when I had questions. As well as the paralegals, Alex and Dylan made sure to follow up on everything and made sure everything was on point. His friendly and down to earth attorney client relationship made me feel like we were always on the same team and that I had the best attorney in my corner. The entire team at Palmer Rodak from the receptionist to Mary in accounting made me feel cared for as a person not just a client, which I believe is invaluable. Matt and the team never clocked time that they were not truly working on my case, they are fair and concise with their timekeeping and do everything in their power to keep the cost low which was even more impressive. During my court dates and evidentiary hearing Matt was extremely organized and reviewed everything with me prior so I knew what we would be reviewing each time. He made it so the hearings weren’t so intimidating and just felt like you were having a conversation rather than being questioned. He was clear and concise, which I believe is the main reason I was able to receive such a positive outcome and convey my case to the judge in the appropriate manner. Even when there were changes and proceedings were nonconventional he rolled with the flow and adapted his approach to keep it comfortable. If I ever have to go back to court the only attorney I would want representing me would be him hands down. I wish him and everyone at Palmer Rodak the best always.

I cannot express enough gratitude for the exceptional service provided by Palmer Rodak & Associates during my child custody battle. Throughout the process, Layla Zad, Esq. was incredibly thorough and detail-oriented, ensuring that every aspect of my case was meticulously prepared. Her strategic approach in court was remarkable. Her professionalism and commitment were evident at every step, and I felt confident knowing she was representing me.
Thanks to Laylas hard work and expertise, I achieved a favorable outcome in my custody battle. I highly recommend her to anyone in need of a skilled and compassionate attorney. She truly goes above and beyond for her clients!

Look no further!! Palmer Rodak & Associates are hands down the best law firm in Southern California. I called and "interviewed" several different law firms. I am very pleased and thankful I chose this law firm. Matthew Palmer wasn't my attorney, at first, but he stepped in; due to the severe complexity of my case. Matthew is my saving grace. Matthew and his entire team truly do care about each and every one of the clients at this law firm. The entire team are extremely nice, organized, pleasant, and wonderful to work with; from attorneys, paralegal, billing, and who answers the phone when you call. I cannot emphasize enough for the fantastic team at this law firm!! Palmer Rodak & Associates Will fight for you. They truly care about the outcome of your future!! Thank you Palmer Rodak & Associates for your time, hard work, dedication, and my freedom. All of you deserve more than 5 stars!

Matthew Coderre put his heart into my case, and I cannot thank him enough for believing in what was best for our daughter. His dedication and care reminded me to stay strong and continue fighting for what is right, even when the road felt difficult.

Matt is not only an exceptionally intelligent attorney but also someone who demonstrates integrity, perseverance, and compassion. I only wish I could have him by my side for every challenge involving our daughter, as his guidance has been invaluable. Without his presence and commitment, I might have burned out.

Thank you, Matthew, for standing by us during the hardest times, believing in our bond, and pushing me forward. Your support has meant everything.

"I couldn’t have asked for a better experience. Matthew Palmer and his team did an outstanding job, ensuring my divorce was finalized smoothly with minimal involvement from me. I truly appreciate the hard work and dedication everyone put into my case. A special thank you to Dylan, who I know played a significant role in making this happen. I’m incredibly grateful to all who were involved.

I chose Palmer Law Firm because they are incredibly family-oriented and attentive. During my 30-minute consultation with Attorney Layla Zad, she listened to my story and took detailed notes. I was searching for a good lawyer after dealing with so many who took my money but never got the job done.

That day, I called eight different lawyers, shared my story, and got quotes. I gave myself a week to think, read reviews, and do my research, but I knew most reviews are just opinions. The following week, I decided to call all the lawyers back. None of them remembered me—except for Palmer Law Firm. When I called their office, I didn’t even speak to the attorney, but the secretary remembered who I was and recapped the notes Attorney Layla Zad had written. That attention to detail sealed the deal for me.

When I visited their office, I felt like more than just a client—I felt like royalty! The entire team made me feel valued and welcomed, like I was part of their family.

When it came time to go to court, Attorney Layla Zad was an absolute powerhouse! I didn’t even have to say a word. She got me everything I wanted—and more. Her dedication and skill blew me away.

What stands out about Palmer Law Firm is that they are not driven by money. They truly care about their clients and the outcomes they achieve. I’m beyond happy with my experience and results. I highly recommend them to anyone seeking compassionate, skilled, and dedicated legal representation.

This whole team is awesome. I was so lost when I first had legal issues. From day one when I walked in those doors I was greeted very warmly. They assured me that everything was gonna be alright. I walked out of the with so much confidence. Even under the circumstances, I walk into every court room with my head held high. They go above and beyond. Thanks you guys. 👍🏽💯

I was extremely worried because my ex is military and didn’t want to do ANY leg work regarding filing. They made it quick and painless and explained everything every step of the way. HIGHLY RECOMMEND! I am so happy I could cry. I honestly never thought I would be able to navigate the divorce process and keep my sanity. So glad I found them!!!!
Attorney Matthew Palmer and paralegal Ashley did a fantastic job handling my case. Their expertise, professionalism, and clear communication made the process smooth and successful. Highly recommend!
My experience with Layla and Dylan was exceptional.  What a great team! I felt supported and respected each step. Thank you so much for your expertise and dedication.
Always a pleasure doing business with Palmer and Rodak. It’s nice it have such caring and kind people when your going through so much uncertainty in life.
Thank you Palmer Rodak and associates!

I had my totally free consultation today with Mr Palmer. Great experience, explained all the in, outs and cost of what we might experience in an attempt to secure a restraining order against my ex. He very easily could have taken my money and started what could be a very long and costly process. Instead he advised we wait and see how things go and if need be to call him back and he would be more than willing to help. Very professional and calming attorney, very grateful for his advise. If the need arises, I will for sure call Mr Palmer back!

We engaged Palmer Rodak & Associates to mediate our divorce. We were able to come to an agreement in one full day of mediation (about as good as one could hope for). I think that Mathew and Layla did a solid job w/ that part.

However, what would follow that agreement was much harder than I anticipated. The real rock stars here are the paralegals that help you to the finish line. Especially Ashley who guided us through the cumbersome process, dealing with the courts (to save me time), and quickly responding to inquiries and (only) escalating when necessary (for cost savings), etc.

I would recommend Palmer Rodak & Associates for your mediation needs.

Layla was my direct lawyer and promised she wouldn’t waste my time in our consultation. That is exactly what she did, all the hidden fees you could imagine. Week delayed responses via email regarding simple questions. It truly felt like I was going through the court process alone. Yet they were charging me left and right for their time that produced nothing. They expect thousands more than the 4.5k starting, a day or two before court hearings.

I was a brand new single mother when I started the legal process with Palmer Rodak and Associates. All they were after was my money, months into the process Layla asked what my sons name was. I have a daughter. Absolutely careless and out for your money.

Watch out for these people. The exact SHARKS you warned about in this field.

I separated from the firm as soon as I realized just how badly Layla screwed both parties, last minute document changes in court. She was not forthcoming about anything and did not thoroughly explain what she was having me sign. She guaranteed legal fees covered by other party, but failed to mention she’d only ask for 1/4 of the total legal fees and that they’d be paid to her firm. It is my money. I will be waiting a year to receive back from them, though they charge for things they don’t tell you about. I’m not expecting anything to come back.

This firm is full of thieves.  Avoid them at all costs.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Audrey,

We are sorry you feel that way, but none of this is accurate. You signed an agreement to resolve all issues, including attorney fees, and we secured those fees for you. Throughout the process, we under-billed you at every step. Before we were even involved, you had already made an informal 50/50 agreement. We did our best to maximize the results within your budget. The case was resolved through an agreement without any issues being litigated. Family Court is challenging, and the results we achieved were far better than what we could have obtained through litigation. We exceeded the recommendations of Family Court Services and secured more custody for you than what was initially suggested. We're sorry, but your frustration is not a consequence of our legal work.

Palmer Rodak & Associates

reviews.text: I’m going through an intense custody case right now attempting to get full custody. Matthew and Alexandria have done so so much to help my child and I! they are professional yet they care on a personal level as well! I definitely recommend coming here for your legal help!

Everyone in the office is so nice, supportive and showed that they cared in every step of the way in taking care of what you need. I highly recommend them. They took care of everything. The office was comfortable even with dealing with a stressful situation.

I highly recommend Mr. Palmer and Mr. Coderre for their exceptional support and dedication in helping me achieve a successful outcome in my custody battle for my 4-year-old son. Despite the initial perception of an unlikely outcome, they were able to disprove false claims made by my son's mother and demonstrate my ability to be a great father. Their upfront and honest approach, coupled with their understanding of the unique challenges faced by military service members, sets them apart. Mr. Coderre's excellent communication and deep investment in my case were evident throughout the process. I am grateful for their commitment to ensuring that the court recognizes our ability to serve as both parents and service members. I wholeheartedly endorse them.

I had the distinct pleasure of being represented by Matthew Palmer during what was undoubtedly the most challenging period of my life. From the very beginning, Palmer Road & Associates stood out to me because Attorney Matthew himself spoke to me over the phone for the consultation and walked me through the necessary steps, rather than having me speak to a paralegal or receptionist like I had to with other firms. During the initial conversation, he exhibited an exceptional level of expertise, dedication, and professionalism that set him apart from any other legal counsel I had encountered.

My divorce was contentious, with numerous complexities and high stakes, but Matthew navigated each hurdle with remarkable skill. He was incredibly thorough, leaving no stone unturned in preparing for the trial. His attention to detail and ability to anticipate the opposing counsel’s moves were nothing short of impressive.

One of the most remarkable aspects of Matthew’s representation was his ability to maintain a perfect balance between aggressive advocacy and compassionate support. He fought tirelessly for my rights and interests, ensuring that every detail was addressed and that I felt confident and informed throughout the process. His strategic approach and sharp litigation skills were evident in the courtroom, where he presented my case with clarity and conviction. Simply put, I couldn’t have asked for better counsel.

Communication was another area where Matthew truly excelled. He was always available to answer my questions, no matter how trivial they seemed, and provided regular updates on the progress of my case. This level of transparency and accessibility helped alleviate much of the anxiety associated with the proceedings.

Ultimately, Matthew secured a favorable outcome that exceeded my expectations. His dedication and expertise helped me achieve the desired court verdict and the peace of mind I needed to move forward with my life.
I wholeheartedly recommend Matthew to anyone in need of a top-tier divorce attorney. His exceptional skills, unwavering dedication, and compassionate approach make him an outstanding choice for anyone facing the daunting prospect of a divorce trial. Thank you, Matthew, for your extraordinary service and for helping me through such a difficult time.
Amazing work! They have helped me so much with my situation and they were always friendly and caring.

Palmer Rodak helped us through a fairly nasty divorce with our daughter and ex husband. They were with us every step of the way, explaining all of our options and being thorough in the court room. Thank you for your diligence.
He took care of the details and I got the benefit.  True professional who I would use again.  The process was so easy because I got the right guy for the job.

My experience with Zev was a very positive one.  He was easy to get a hold of and always returned my calls in a very timely manner.  He broke things down so procedures, processes, and protocols were easy to comprehend.  He kept me informed and explained things so I felt I had a thorough understanding of what was going on with my case at all times.  I would strongly recommend him should you ever be in need of a personal injury attorney.  I hope for your sake that's not the case but if it is you can be assured you're made the right call if you decide to use his expertise in helping you get the results you feel you deserve.

It was a great pleasure working with Mr. Rubinstein. Since I contacted The Rubinstein Law Group, Zev personally contacted me and I since day one the communication was great, He was always available for any question or concern I had regarding my case. Mr. Rubinstein made sure I had the treatment I deserved and got better after my accident. I was really happy with the outcome of my case and I'm really thankful for all the work and help from The Rubinstein Law Group.

I have used Rubinstein's services for more than a few years and I am more than pleased with the quality of his services. He is very professional and responsive with great attention to detail and I would highly recommend him to friends and family.

Zev Rubinstein was very helpful in my case, I am really glad I choose him after my car accident. He always kept me informed and would propose all the options and would not pressure me to take one unless I was truly ok with it. The insurance company likes to draw out the process and Zev was very upfront about their strategy and was able to help me navigate through all the complexities. He would take as much time as needed to prep and go over things as needed. I am so grateful for his patience and guidance throughout this whole process.

Zev Rubinstein handled my case efficiently and professionally. He was very helpful with the entire process, he always kept me informed, and was always there when I needed him. Zev stood his ground with the insurance company and didn’t allow them to walk all over me. He made the whole process stress free for me and that was a breath of fresh air. I really appreciate Zev for all of his hard work and patience that went into handling my case and I would highly recommend him to anyone.

After my car accident, I contacted Zev Rubinstein and am glad I did. The best part about dealing with Zev is his excellent communication. He was always easy to reach, guided me through confusing parts of the process, and kept me updated on the status of my case. He makes sure things are clear and that you understand your options before proceeding to next steps. Zev negotiating on my behalf with the insurance company took a lot of stress off my shoulders, and I highly recommend him for anyone needing a personal injury attorney.

Zev is an absolutely wonderful attorney to work with. He handled everything for me in such a gracious  and effective way: calls with insurance, calls with the hospital, calls with billing, etc. He was always available to talk about the case, explain anything that was confusing, and was always hard at work on my settlement. I definitely recommend Zev as a personal injury attorney.

Zev Rubinstein is a wonderful attorney, and was a great help in the lawsuit I ended up in after being hit by a drunk driver. He stayed on top of everything for me and was great about communicating - always answering his phone, or letting me know when he would be able to if he was busy. He handled the case very quickly and negotiated to get the best outcome for me, even finding money from other insurances to pay the bills until we got reimbursed. Thank you Zev!

I had an auto accident in 2018. I was injured and required comprehensive medical care. I secured the  services of Zev Rubenstein and I couldn't have been happier.

Zev kept track of all my documents, important dates and stood firm in all negotiations. He even met me at the train station because I didn't have a car. I highly recommend Zev Rubenstein and would use him again without hesitation.

Thank you Zev!
Great attorney to work with. Straight to the point! Always answers his phone. Gives you the best option for your case.

I highly recommend Zev in the Rubinstein Law Group. I had an accident and injured in 2017. Zev sat with me to review all situations and my injuries. He gave good advice on injury treatments and even recommended good specialist if I did not have a proper one. He always represented my interest when talked with the other party's insurance company. Very professional and responsible. My case was handled very well by Zev and I am satisfied to the compensation after the case was settle down (Zev gave the detailed break-down expense and the money I should get).

Zev Rubinstein stands by his word; he has proven to be a great lawyer. He is always there to guide you, answers all your questions, and works with your schedule. This has been my first car accident and would have been lost without Zev. He took a lot of weight and stress out of my shoulders. He is straight forward and will make sure everything is clear before proceeding to the next step. I had the worst car insurance and Zev had to put up with their unprofessional staff.  Zev never gives up and fights for his clients until the end; my case was over in less than a year. If you want an easy process and you want to be stress free then Zev is your lawyer. I know I will be recommending him with my friends and neighbors.

Zev Rubinstein was recommended to me by my mother in law. He is a great lawyer. He was very professional and personable. He was flexible with his meeting times and was accommodating to my work schedule. He was very knowledgeable and made going through my case a fairly easy process.
I appreciate everything that Zev has done for me and my family. I will definitely  be recommending him to my friends and family. Thank you!

Having experienced my first ever car accident I was unsure of how to deal with my insurance and the other party involved. When our daughter was involved in an accident while driving her two younger brothers home from school, we thought it would be a straight forward claim to the other party's insurance since it was clearly their fault and witnessed by a police officer! Well, when the insurance company didn't return our calls, we decided that it was time to bring in someone who knows how to deal with these situations. After a quick search of review sites like yelp, we found our lawyer! Zev took care of everything with very minimal involvement from my family. He even negotiated a settlement I'm sure we would not have gotten on our own. Now that is the way to deal with insurance companies. He even kept us updated with timely reports concerning where we were in the process - we didn't have to hound him to find out what was going on. I hope we are never in this situation again, but if we are I know who we're going to call first.

When this second car accident happened to me, there wasn't a doubt in my mind on which attorney to call.  I have used Zev Rubenstein in the past for another car accident and as much as the whole experience is horrible and something you want finished ASAP, Zev helps the situation significantly with his professionalism, experience, advice and flexibility.  As far as turnaround time goes from when the car accident happened until when we received the settlement check from him, it was about a year.  It was only that long because of the doctor visits and the time needing to fully recover from the accident so we knew what the full damage was, physically.  From when the appointments were finished until when we received the check, it was about two months, as he had to prepare the demand letter and work to get the best case scenario for our family.  I can honestly say that he went above and beyond for us (i.e. by making contact with those in the medical field that I could not get ahold of).   I would strongly recommend him to anyone who inquired for a personal injury attorney.

I worked with Matt Odgers on the acquisition of my medical practice, Haven Elite Urgent Care, and I couldn’t have asked for a better attorney or experience.

What really stood out was how calm, clear, and professional he was, even when the process got complicated. He made a stressful transaction feel manageable and ensured everything was done the right way.
I highly recommend Odgers Law Group and Matt for any physician or healthcare professional looking to buy, sell, or structure a medical practice. Truly top-notch service and expertise.

Matt consistently delivered on time, met all deadlines, and was proactive in identifying and resolving potential issues before they became problems. His deep knowledge of dental transactions and legal expertise made what could have been a stressful experience incredibly smooth and straightforward.

Thanks to Matt’s guidance and attention to detail, the transaction was completed seamlessly. I have full confidence in his abilities and would highly recommend him to any of my colleagues or anyone seeking legal counsel, especially within the dental or healthcare industry. Working with Matt was a truly positive experience, and I look forward to collaborating with him again in the future.

Arguably the best attorney I have experienced in San Diego. I run a dental practice and had found myself in a really difficult situation. I had already spoken to six other attorneys, but none came close to the level of clarity and expertise care that Matt Odgers provided.

At this point, I can say that I have worked with him long enough to truly appreciate how honest and thorough he is. He is not only sharp and well-versed in dental law, but is also very organized and compassionate. I wish I could leave a video testimonial just to show how much gratitude I have. If you are a dental professional in California and you are navigating anything remotely legal, this is where you need to call. You will not be disappointed.

From our first meeting, it was clear that she was honest and trustworthy; she is incredibly knowledgeable about the nuances of corporate reorganization. She was efficient and expedient, moving our case forward without any unnecessary delays, which is critical when your business's survival is on the line. Her thoroughness gave us total confidence; she never missed a detail in our filings or our reorganization plan.
What truly sets her apart, however, is her toughness. She was not afraid to confront aggressive creditors and negotiate firmly on our behalf to ensure a fair outcome. If you need an attorney who is both a brilliant strategist and a fierce advocate, Joanne Sanchez is the professional you want in your corner. She saved our business, and we are forever grateful."
RMBQ INC.
Raymond Gomez
